import React, { useState, useEffect, useMemo } from 'react';
import {
Users, DollarSign, Calendar, TrendingUp, Briefcase, Shield, Settings,
Download, Plus, Search, FileText, CheckCircle, Clock, AlertCircle,
Trash2, Edit, LogOut, Sun, Moon, FileSpreadsheet, Database, BookOpen,
Menu, X, Building, Bell, UserCheck, Key, RefreshCw, Send, Check,
Printer, ChevronRight
} from 'lucide-react';
// Dummy Initial Data for 11 Divisions specified in the prompt
const INITIAL_DIVISIONS = [
{ id: '1', name: 'Waiter', baseSalary: 3200000 },
{ id: '2', name: 'Kasir', baseSalary: 3500000 },
{ id: '3', name: 'Nusantara', baseSalary: 4500000 },
{ id: '4', name: 'Seafood', baseSalary: 4800000 },
{ id: '5', name: 'Cendol', baseSalary: 3000000 },
{ id: '6', name: 'Minuman', baseSalary: 3100000 },
{ id: '7', name: 'CleanUp', baseSalary: 2800000 },
{ id: '8', name: 'Kebersihan', baseSalary: 2800000 },
{ id: '9', name: 'Cucian Piring', baseSalary: 2700000 },
{ id: '10', name: 'Staff Gudang', baseSalary: 3600000 },
{ id: '11', name: 'Potongan', baseSalary: 3000000 }
];
const INITIAL_EMPLOYEES = [
{
nik: 'EMP001',
name: 'Andi Hermawan',
email: 'andi@company.com',
phone: '081234567890',
address: 'Jl. Merdeka No. 12, Jakarta',
joinDate: '2023-01-15',
status: 'Tetap', // Tetap, Kontrak, Magang
position: 'Head Chef',
division: 'Nusantara',
baseSalary: 6500000,
isActive: true,
photoUrl: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1534528741775-
53994a69daeb?auto=format&fit=crop&q=80&w=150',
},
{
nik: 'EMP002',
name: 'Budi Santoso',
email: 'budi@company.com',
phone: '082198765432',
address: 'Jl. Sudirman No. 45, Bandung',
joinDate: '2025-10-10', // Contract nearing end in late 2026
status: 'Kontrak',
position: 'Lead Waiter',
division: 'Waiter',
baseSalary: 3800000,
isActive: true,
photoUrl: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1507003211169-
0a1dd7228f2d?auto=format&fit=crop&q=80&w=150',
},
{
nik: 'EMP003',
name: 'Citra Kirana',
email: 'citra@company.com',
phone: '085712345678',
address: 'Jl. Diponegoro No. 89, Surabaya',
joinDate: '2024-06-01',
status: 'Tetap',
position: 'Supervisor Kasir',
division: 'Kasir',
baseSalary: 4200000,
isActive: true,
photoUrl: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1494790108377-
be9c29b29330?auto=format&fit=crop&q=80&w=150',
},
{
nik: 'EMP004',
name: 'Dedi Setiadi',
email: 'dedi@company.com',
phone: '089988776655',
address: 'Jl. Gajah Mada No. 3, Medan',
joinDate: '2026-01-10',
status: 'Magang',
position: 'Kitchen Support',
division: 'CleanUp',
baseSalary: 2800000,
isActive: true,
photoUrl: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1500648767791-
00dcc994a43e?auto=format&fit=crop&q=80&w=150',
},
{
nik: 'EMP005',
name: 'Eka Lestari',
email: 'eka@company.com',
phone: '081344556677',
address: 'Jl. Pemuda No. 71, Semarang',
joinDate: '2026-03-01',
status: 'Kontrak',
position: 'Barista Cendol',
division: 'Cendol',
baseSalary: 3000000,
isActive: true,
photoUrl: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1438761681033-
6461ffad8d80?auto=format&fit=crop&q=80&w=150',
}
];
const INITIAL_ATTENDANCE = [
{ nik: 'EMP001', date: '2026-05-29', checkIn: '09:15', checkOut:
'18:00', status: 'Hadir', minutesLate: 0 },
{ nik: 'EMP002', date: '2026-05-29', checkIn: '09:45', checkOut:
'18:15', status: 'Hadir', minutesLate: 15 }, // Late (threshold 09:30)
{ nik: 'EMP003', date: '2026-05-29', checkIn: '09:28', checkOut:
'18:00', status: 'Hadir', minutesLate: 0 },
{ nik: 'EMP004', date: '2026-05-29', checkIn: '', checkOut: '', status:
'Izin', minutesLate: 0 },
{ nik: 'EMP005', date: '2026-05-29', checkIn: '10:05', checkOut:
'18:00', status: 'Hadir', minutesLate: 35 } // Late
];
const INITIAL_PAYROLLS = [
{
id: 'PAY-202605-01',
nik: 'EMP001',
name: 'Andi Hermawan',
division: 'Nusantara',
month: 'Mei 2026',
baseSalary: 6500000,
allowance: 1200000, // Tunjangan Jabatan & Makan
deduction: 250000, // BPJS & Pajak
bonus: 500000,
overtime: 300000,
netSalary: 8250000,
status: 'Approved',
approvedBy: 'Yusuf (Manager)',
approvedDate: '2026-05-28'
},
{
id: 'PAY-202605-02',
nik: 'EMP002',
name: 'Budi Santoso',
division: 'Waiter',
month: 'Mei 2026',
baseSalary: 3800000,
allowance: 600000,
deduction: 180000,
bonus: 200000,
overtime: 150000,
netSalary: 4570000,
status: 'Pending Approval',
approvedBy: '',
approvedDate: ''
},
{
id: 'PAY-202605-03',
nik: 'EMP003',
name: 'Citra Kirana',
division: 'Kasir',
month: 'Mei 2026',
baseSalary: 4200000,
allowance: 800000,
deduction: 210000,
bonus: 300000,
overtime: 0,
netSalary: 5090000,
status: 'Approved',
approvedBy: 'Yusuf (Manager)',
approvedDate: '2026-05-28'
}
];
const INITIAL_ALLOWANCE_SETTINGS = [
{ id: 'all_jabatan', name: 'Tunjangan Jabatan', amount: 500000, type:
'Tetap' },
{ id: 'all_transport', name: 'Tunjangan Transport', amount: 300000,
type: 'Harian' },
{ id: 'all_makan', name: 'Tunjangan Makan', amount: 400000, type:
'Harian' }
];
const INITIAL_DEDUCTION_SETTINGS = [
{ id: 'ded_bpjs', name: 'BPJS Kesehatan & Ketenagakerjaan', amount:
150000, type: 'Tetap' },
{ id: 'ded_pajak', name: 'Pajak PPh 21', amount: 100000, type:
'Persentase/Tetap' },
{ id: 'ded_late', name: 'Potongan Keterlambatan (per mnt)', amount:
5000, type: 'Variabel' }
];
const INITIAL_AUDIT_LOGS = [
{ timestamp: '2026-05-29 09:30:00', user: 'HRD Amelia', action:
'Melakukan check-in massal karyawan' },
{ timestamp: '2026-05-29 09:45:12', user: 'Super Admin', action:
'Mengubah Tunjangan Jabatan menjadi Rp 500.000' },
{ timestamp: '2026-05-28 17:00:22', user: 'Manager Yusuf', action:
'Menyetujui payroll Andi Hermawan' },
{ timestamp: '2026-05-28 16:45:00', user: 'HRD Amelia', action:
'Membuat draf payroll bulan Mei 2026' }
];
export default function App() {
const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState('dashboard'); // dashboard,
karyawan, absensi, payroll, tunjangan, laporan, devhub, settings
const [darkMode, setDarkMode] = useState(false);
const [currentRole, setCurrentRole] = useState('Super Admin'); // Super
Admin, HRD, Manager, Staff
const [employees, setEmployees] = useState(() => {
const saved = localStorage.getItem('payroll_employees');
return saved ? JSON.parse(saved) : INITIAL_EMPLOYEES;
});
const [attendance, setAttendance] = useState(() => {
const saved = localStorage.getItem('payroll_attendance');
return saved ? JSON.parse(saved) : INITIAL_ATTENDANCE;
});
const [payrolls, setPayrolls] = useState(() => {
const saved = localStorage.getItem('payroll_slips');
return saved ? JSON.parse(saved) : INITIAL_PAYROLLS;
});
const [allowanceSettings, setAllowanceSettings] =
useState(INITIAL_ALLOWANCE_SETTINGS);
const [deductionSettings, setDeductionSettings] =
useState(INITIAL_DEDUCTION_SETTINGS);
const [auditLogs, setAuditLogs] = useState(INITIAL_AUDIT_LOGS);
// App-level alerts
const [alerts, setAlerts] = useState([
{ id: 1, type: 'warning', message: 'Kontrak Budi Santoso (EMP002)
tersisa kurang dari 6 bulan.' },
{ id: 2, type: 'info', message: 'Ada 1 draf payroll menunggu
persetujuan Manager.' }
]);
// Company Settings
const [companySettings, setCompanySettings] = useState({
name: 'PT Kuliner Nusantara Group',
address: 'Grand Indonesia Mall, Lt. 5, Jakarta Pusat',
logoUrl: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1555396273-
367ea4eb4db5?auto=format&fit=crop&q=80&w=120',
bpjsRate: 2, // %
lateFeePerMinute: 5000,
defaultCheckIn: '09:30',
branch: 'Cabang Utama Jakarta'
});
// Persistance
useEffect(() => {
localStorage.setItem('payroll_employees', JSON.stringify(employees));
}, [employees]);
useEffect(() => {
localStorage.setItem('payroll_attendance',
JSON.stringify(attendance));
}, [attendance]);
useEffect(() => {
localStorage.setItem('payroll_slips', JSON.stringify(payrolls));
}, [payrolls]);
const addAuditLog = (action) => {
const newLog = {
timestamp: new Date().toISOString().replace('T', ' ').substring(0,
19),
user: `${currentRole} User`,
action
};
setAuditLogs(prev => [newLog, ...prev]);
};
const deleteAlert = (id) => {
setAlerts(alerts.filter(a => a.id !== id));
};
return (
<div className={`${darkMode ? 'dark bg-slate-950 text-slate-100' :
'bg-slate-50 text-slate-900'} min-h-screen font-sans transition-colors
duration-200`}>
{/* Outer Flex Container */}
<div className="flex min-h-screen overflow-hidden">
{/* SIDEBAR COMPONENT */}
<Sidebar
activeTab={activeTab}
setActiveTab={setActiveTab}
currentRole={currentRole}
companyName={companySettings.name}
companyLogo={companySettings.logoUrl}
/>
{/* MAIN DISPLAY WINDOW */}
<main className="flex-1 flex flex-col min-w-0 overflow-y-auto h-
screen">
{/* TOP NAVBAR COMPONENT */}
<Header
darkMode={darkMode}
setDarkMode={setDarkMode}
currentRole={currentRole}
setCurrentRole={setCurrentRole}
alerts={alerts}
deleteAlert={deleteAlert}
companyBranch={companySettings.branch}
/>
{/* PAGE INNER CONTENT CONTAINER */}
<div className="flex-1 p-6 md:p-8 space-y-6">
{/* Tab Swapping Router Switch */}
{activeTab === 'dashboard' && (
<DashboardView
employees={employees}
payrolls={payrolls}
attendance={attendance}
companySettings={companySettings}
setActiveTab={setActiveTab}
/>
)}
{activeTab === 'karyawan' && (
<EmployeeView
employees={employees}
setEmployees={setEmployees}
divisions={INITIAL_DIVISIONS}
currentRole={currentRole}
addAuditLog={addAuditLog}
/>
)}
{activeTab === 'absensi' && (
<AttendanceView
employees={employees}
attendance={attendance}
setAttendance={setAttendance}
companySettings={companySettings}
currentRole={currentRole}
addAuditLog={addAuditLog}
/>
)}
{activeTab === 'payroll' && (
<PayrollView
employees={employees}
payrolls={payrolls}
setPayrolls={setPayrolls}
allowances={allowanceSettings}
deductions={deductionSettings}
currentRole={currentRole}
addAuditLog={addAuditLog}
companySettings={companySettings}
/>
)}
{activeTab === 'tunjangan' && (
<AllowanceDeductionView
allowanceSettings={allowanceSettings}
setAllowanceSettings={setAllowanceSettings}
deductionSettings={deductionSettings}
setDeductionSettings={setDeductionSettings}
currentRole={currentRole}
addAuditLog={addAuditLog}
/>
)}
{activeTab === 'laporan' && (
<ReportsView
employees={employees}
payrolls={payrolls}
attendance={attendance}
divisions={INITIAL_DIVISIONS}
/>
)}
{activeTab === 'settings' && (
<SettingsView
companySettings={companySettings}
setCompanySettings={setCompanySettings}
currentRole={currentRole}
auditLogs={auditLogs}
addAuditLog={addAuditLog}
/>
)}
{activeTab === 'devhub' && (
<DeveloperHubView />
)}
</div>
{/* SYSTEM FOOTER */}
<footer className="border-t border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-
800 p-4 text-center text-xs text-slate-400 dark:text-slate-500 bg-
white/50 dark:bg-slate-900/50">
© 2026 {companySettings.name}. Dirancang dengan standar
kepatuhan ketenagakerjaan RI & sistem kemanan enterprise.
</footer>
</main>
</div>
</div>
);
}
function Sidebar({ activeTab, setActiveTab, currentRole, companyName,
companyLogo }) {
const menuItems = [
{ id: 'dashboard', label: 'Dashboard', icon: TrendingUp, roles:
['Super Admin', 'HRD', 'Manager', 'Staff'] },
{ id: 'karyawan', label: 'Karyawan', icon: Users, roles: ['Super
Admin', 'HRD', 'Manager'] },
{ id: 'absensi', label: 'Absensi Harian', icon: Calendar, roles:
['Super Admin', 'HRD', 'Manager', 'Staff'] },
{ id: 'payroll', label: 'Proses Payroll', icon: DollarSign, roles:
['Super Admin', 'HRD', 'Manager'] },
{ id: 'tunjangan', label: 'Tunjangan & Potongan', icon: Briefcase,
roles: ['Super Admin', 'HRD'] },
{ id: 'laporan', label: 'Laporan Finansial', icon: FileSpreadsheet,
roles: ['Super Admin', 'HRD', 'Manager'] },
{ id: 'settings', label: 'Pengaturan & Audit', icon: Settings, roles:
['Super Admin', 'HRD'] },
{ id: 'devhub', label: 'Developer Code Hub', icon: Database, roles:
['Super Admin', 'HRD', 'Manager', 'Staff'] },
];
const allowedMenu = menuItems.filter(item =>
item.roles.includes(currentRole));
return (
<aside className="w-64 bg-slate-900 text-slate-100 flex flex-col
shrink-0 border-r border-slate-800 hidden md:flex">
{/* Brand Logo */}
<div className="p-6 border-b border-slate-800 flex items-center
gap-3">
<div className="w-10 h-10 bg-indigo-600 rounded-lg flex items-
center justify-center font-bold text-white shadow-md shadow-indigo-600/30
overflow-hidden">
<img src={companyLogo} alt="Logo" className="w-full h-full
object-cover" />
</div>
<div>
<h1 className="font-bold text-md leading-tight tracking-wide
text-white">GajiKu</h1>
<span className="text-[10px] text-indigo-400 font-semibold
uppercase tracking-wider">Enterprise HRIS</span>
</div>
</div>
{/* Navigation Links */}
<nav className="flex-1 p-4 space-y-1">
{allowedMenu.map((item) => {
const Icon = item.icon;
const isActive = activeTab === item.id;
return (
<button
key={item.id}
onClick={() => setActiveTab(item.id)}
className={`w-full flex items-center gap-3 px-4 py-3
rounded-lg text-sm font-medium transition-all ${
isActive
? 'bg-gradient-to-r from-indigo-600 to-indigo-700 text-
white shadow-md shadow-indigo-900/30'
: 'text-slate-400 hover:bg-slate-800 hover:text-slate-
200'
}`}
>
<Icon size={18} className={isActive ? 'text-white' : 'text-
slate-400'} />
<span>{item.label}</span>
</button>
);
})}
</nav>
{/* Bottom Profile / Quick Info */}
<div className="p-4 border-t border-slate-800 bg-slate-950/40">
<div className="flex items-center gap-3">
<div className="w-8 h-8 rounded-full bg-slate-700 flex items-
center justify-center text-xs font-bold text-white">
{currentRole.substring(0,2).toUpperCase()}
</div>
<div className="min-w-0 flex-1">
<p className="text-xs font-semibold text-slate-200
truncate">Sistem Aktif</p>
<p className="text-[10px] text-emerald-400 flex items-center
gap-1">
<span className="w-1.5 h-1.5 rounded-full bg-emerald-400
animate-pulse"></span>
{currentRole} Mode
</p>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</aside>
);
}
function Header({ darkMode, setDarkMode, currentRole, setCurrentRole,
alerts, deleteAlert, companyBranch }) {
const [showNotifications, setShowNotifications] = useState(false);
const roles = ['Super Admin', 'HRD', 'Manager', 'Staff'];
return (
<header className="bg-white dark:bg-slate-900 border-b border-slate-
200 dark:border-slate-800 px-6 py-4 flex items-center justify-between
shadow-sm relative shrink-0">
{/* Branch & Welcome */}
<div className="flex items-center gap-3">
<Building className="text-indigo-600 dark:text-indigo-400"
size={20} />
<div>
<p className="text-xs text-slate-500 dark:text-slate-400 font-
medium">{companyBranch}</p>
<h2 className="text-sm font-bold text-slate-800 dark:text-
slate-100 hidden sm:block">Dashboard Konsol Penggajian</h2>
</div>
</div>
{/* Multi-utility Controls */}
<div className="flex items-center gap-4">
{/* Real-time Role Swapper for Simulation */}
<div className="flex items-center gap-1.5 bg-slate-100 dark:bg-
slate-800 px-3 py-1.5 rounded-full border border-slate-200 dark:border-
slate-700">
<Shield size={14} className="text-indigo-600 dark:text-indigo-
400" />
<span className="text-xs font-bold text-slate-500 dark:text-
slate-400 hidden lg:inline">Role Simulasi:</span>
<select
value={currentRole}
onChange={(e) => setCurrentRole(e.target.value)}
className="bg-transparent border-none text-xs font-bold
focus:ring-0 text-slate-800 dark:text-slate-100 cursor-pointer outline-
none"
>
{roles.map(r => <option key={r} value={r} className="dark:bg-
slate-950">{r}</option>)}
</select>
</div>
{/* Dark Mode Toggle */}
<button
onClick={() => setDarkMode(!darkMode)}
className="p-2 rounded-lg bg-slate-100 dark:bg-slate-800 text-
slate-600 dark:text-slate-300 hover:bg-slate-200 dark:hover:bg-slate-700
transition"
title="Toggle Dark Mode"
>
{darkMode ? <Sun size={18} /> : <Moon size={18} />}
</button>
{/* Notifications and Alerts System */}
<div className="relative">
<button
onClick={() => setShowNotifications(!showNotifications)}
className="p-2 rounded-lg bg-slate-100 dark:bg-slate-800
text-slate-600 dark:text-slate-300 hover:bg-slate-200 dark:hover:bg-
slate-700 transition relative"
>
<Bell size={18} />
{alerts.length > 0 && (
<span className="absolute top-0.5 right-0.5 w-2 h-2
rounded-full bg-red-500 ring-2 ring-white dark:ring-slate-900 animate-
ping"></span>
)}
</button>
{/* Notifications Dropdown Window */}
{showNotifications && (
<div className="absolute right-0 mt-3 w-80 bg-white dark:bg-
slate-900 border border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-800 rounded-xl
shadow-xl z-50 p-4 space-y-3">
<div className="flex justify-between items-center border-b
pb-2 dark:border-slate-800">
<h4 className="text-xs font-bold text-slate-800
dark:text-slate-100 uppercase tracking-wider">Notifikasi Sistem</h4>
<span className="text-[10px] bg-indigo-100 dark:bg-
indigo-950 text-indigo-700 dark:text-indigo-400 px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full
font-bold">{alerts.length} Baru</span>
</div>
{alerts.length === 0 ? (
<p className="text-xs text-slate-500 text-center py-
4">Tidak ada notifikasi baru.</p>
) : (
<div className="space-y-2 max-h-60 overflow-y-auto pr-1">
{alerts.map((alert) => (
<div
key={alert.id}
className={`p-2.5 rounded-lg text-xs flex gap-2.5
justify-between items-start border ${
alert.type === 'warning'
? 'bg-amber-50 border-amber-200 text-amber-900
dark:bg-amber-950/20 dark:border-amber-800/40 dark:text-amber-200'
: 'bg-indigo-50 border-indigo-200 text-indigo-
950 dark:bg-indigo-950/20 dark:border-indigo-800/40 dark:text-indigo-200'
}`}
>
<div className="flex gap-2">
{alert.type === 'warning' ? <AlertCircle
size={15} className="shrink-0" /> : <InfoIcon size={15}
className="shrink-0" />}
<p>{alert.message}</p>
</div>
<button
onClick={() => deleteAlert(alert.id)}
className="text-slate-400 hover:text-slate-600
dark:hover:text-slate-200"
>
<X size={12} />
</button>
</div>
))}
</div>
)}
</div>
)}
</div>
</div>
</header>
);
}
function InfoIcon({ size, className }) {
return <Clock size={size} className={className} />;
}
function DashboardView({ employees, payrolls, attendance,
companySettings, setActiveTab }) {
// Aggregate Stats
const totalEmployees = employees.length;
const activeEmployees = employees.filter(e => e.isActive).length;
// Calculate total payroll paid out last month
const totalPayrollThisMonth = payrolls
.filter(p => p.status === 'Approved')
.reduce((sum, curr) => sum + curr.netSalary, 0);
// Nearing contract ends (mocked heuristic - hired since late 2025/2026
under contracts)
const expiringContracts = employees.filter(e => e.status ===
'Kontrak').length;
// Custom Chart Data: Salaries by Division
const divisionSpending = employees.reduce((acc, emp) => {
acc[emp.division] = (acc[emp.division] || 0) + emp.baseSalary;
return acc;
}, {});
const chartData = Object.keys(divisionSpending).map(div => ({
name: div,
amount: divisionSpending[div]
}));
// Attendance metrics for today
const attendanceToday = attendance.filter(a => a.date === '2026-05-
29');
const presentCount = attendanceToday.filter(a => a.status ===
'Hadir').length;
const lateCount = attendanceToday.filter(a => a.minutesLate >
0).length;
const absentCount = attendanceToday.filter(a => ['Izin', 'Sakit',
'Alpha'].includes(a.status)).length;
return (
<div className="space-y-6">
{/* Page Title Header */}
<div>
<h2 className="text-2xl font-black text-slate-800 dark:text-
slate-100 flex items-center gap-2 tracking-tight">
Ringkasan Dashboard <span className="text-xs px-2.5 py-1
rounded bg-indigo-100 dark:bg-indigo-950 text-indigo-700 dark:text-
indigo-400 font-extrabold uppercase">Live Metrics</span>
</h2>
<p className="text-sm text-slate-500 dark:text-slate-400">Selamat
datang kembali! Berikut metrik komparasi dan status payroll hari ini.</p>
</div>
{/* Modern High-Fidelity Cards Grid */}
<div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-
6">
{/* Total Employees */}
<div className="bg-white dark:bg-slate-900 rounded-2xl p-6 border
border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-800 shadow-sm flex items-center gap-4
hover:shadow-md transition">
<div className="p-4 rounded-xl bg-indigo-50 dark:bg-indigo-950
text-indigo-600 dark:text-indigo-400">
<Users size={24} />
</div>
<div>
<span className="text-xs text-slate-500 dark:text-slate-400
font-medium">Total Karyawan</span>
<h3 className="text-2xl font-extrabold text-slate-800
dark:text-slate-100">{totalEmployees}</h3>
<p className="text-[10px] text-emerald-500 font-semibold flex
items-center gap-0.5 mt-0.5">
<span>aktif: {activeEmployees}</span>
</p>
</div>
</div>
{/* Total Payroll Outflow */}
<div className="bg-white dark:bg-slate-900 rounded-2xl p-6 border
border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-800 shadow-sm flex items-center gap-4
hover:shadow-md transition">
<div className="p-4 rounded-xl bg-emerald-50 dark:bg-emerald-
950 text-emerald-600 dark:text-emerald-400">
<DollarSign size={24} />
</div>
<div>
<span className="text-xs text-slate-500 dark:text-slate-400
font-medium">Payroll Bulan Ini</span>
<h3 className="text-2xl font-extrabold text-slate-800
dark:text-slate-100">
Rp {(totalPayrollThisMonth / 1000000).toFixed(1)}M
</h3>
<p className="text-[10px] text-slate-500 dark:text-slate-400
font-semibold mt-0.5">
Sudah disetujui
</p>
</div>
</div>
{/* Present Today */}
<div className="bg-white dark:bg-slate-900 rounded-2xl p-6 border
border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-800 shadow-sm flex items-center gap-4
hover:shadow-md transition">
<div className="p-4 rounded-xl bg-amber-50 dark:bg-amber-950
text-amber-600 dark:text-amber-400">
<Calendar size={24} />
</div>
<div>
<span className="text-xs text-slate-500 dark:text-slate-400
font-medium">Absensi Hari Ini</span>
<h3 className="text-2xl font-extrabold text-slate-800
dark:text-slate-100">{presentCount} Hadir</h3>
<p className="text-[10px] text-rose-500 font-semibold mt-0.5
flex items-center gap-1">
<span>{lateCount} Terlambat</span> • <span>{absentCount}
Tidak Hadir</span>
</p>
</div>
</div>
{/* Expiring Contracts */}
<div className="bg-white dark:bg-slate-900 rounded-2xl p-6 border
border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-800 shadow-sm flex items-center gap-4
hover:shadow-md transition">
<div className="p-4 rounded-xl bg-purple-50 dark:bg-purple-950
text-purple-600 dark:text-purple-400">
<AlertCircle size={24} />
</div>
<div>
<span className="text-xs text-slate-500 dark:text-slate-400
font-medium">Karyawan Kontrak</span>
<h3 className="text-2xl font-extrabold text-slate-800
dark:text-slate-100">{expiringContracts} Orang</h3>
<p className="text-[10px] text-indigo-500 font-semibold mt-
0.5">
Siklus review aktif
</p>
</div>
</div>
</div>
{/* Main Graph & Division Statistics Block */}
<div className="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-6">
{/* Custom SVG Interactive Bar Graph of Division Payrolls */}
<div className="bg-white dark:bg-slate-900 border border-slate-
200 dark:border-slate-800 rounded-2xl p-6 shadow-sm lg:col-span-2 space-
y-4">
<div className="flex justify-between items-center">
<div>
<h3 className="text-sm font-black text-slate-800 dark:text-
slate-100 uppercase tracking-wider">Alokasi Anggaran Gaji Per Divisi</h3>
<p className="text-xs text-slate-500">Distribusi kumulatif
dari komponen gaji pokok per divisi</p>
</div>
</div>
<div className="h-64 flex items-end gap-2 pt-6 px-2 border-b
border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-800">
{chartData.map((data, idx) => {
const maxAmount = Math.max(...chartData.map(d => d.amount),
1);
const barHeightPercent = (data.amount / maxAmount) * 80; //
Scale to max 80% height
return (
<div key={idx} className="flex-1 flex flex-col items-
center group cursor-pointer relative">
{/* Tooltip on hover */}
<div className="absolute bottom-full mb-2 bg-slate-900
text-white text-[10px] px-2.5 py-1 rounded shadow-lg opacity-0 group-
hover:opacity-100 transition duration-150 z-20 pointer-events-none
whitespace-nowrap">
Rp {(data.amount).toLocaleString('id-ID')}
</div>
{/* Visual Bar */}
<div
className="w-full bg-gradient-to-t from-indigo-600
to-indigo-400 hover:from-indigo-500 hover:to-indigo-300 rounded-t-md
transition-all duration-300"
style={{ height: `${barHeightPercent}%` }}
></div>
<span className="text-[9px] font-bold text-slate-400
dark:text-slate-500 truncate w-full text-center mt-2 group-hover:text-
indigo-600 dark:group-hover:text-indigo-400">
{data.name}
</span>
</div>
);
})}
</div>
</div>
{/* Division Stats Checklist */}
<div className="bg-white dark:bg-slate-900 border border-slate-
200 dark:border-slate-800 rounded-2xl p-6 shadow-sm space-y-4">
<h3 className="text-sm font-black text-slate-800 dark:text-
slate-100 uppercase tracking-wider">Statistik Divisi Terpadat</h3>
<div className="space-y-3">
{INITIAL_DIVISIONS.slice(0, 5).map((div, i) => {
const count = employees.filter(e => e.division ===
div.name).length;
const pct = Math.round((count / totalEmployees) * 100) ||
0;
return (
<div key={i} className="space-y-1">
<div className="flex justify-between text-xs">
<span className="font-semibold text-slate-700
dark:text-slate-300">{div.name}</span>
<span className="text-slate-500 font-bold">{count}
Karyawan ({pct}%)</span>
</div>
<div className="w-full h-1.5 bg-slate-100 dark:bg-
slate-800 rounded-full overflow-hidden">
<div className="h-full bg-indigo-500 rounded-full"
style={{ width: `${pct}%` }}></div>
</div>
</div>
);
})}
</div>
<div className="pt-3 border-t border-slate-100 dark:border-
slate-800">
<button
onClick={() => setActiveTab('karyawan')}
className="w-full py-2 bg-slate-50 hover:bg-slate-100
dark:bg-slate-800 dark:hover:bg-slate-700/80 rounded-lg text-xs font-bold
text-indigo-600 dark:text-indigo-400 transition flex items-center
justify-center gap-1.5"
>
<span>Kelola Semua Karyawan</span>
<ChevronRight size={14} />
</button>
</div>
</div>
</div>
{/* Quick Alerts and Logs */}
<div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-6">
{/* Real-time Absensi Tracker */}
<div className="bg-white dark:bg-slate-900 border border-slate-
200 dark:border-slate-800 rounded-2xl p-6 shadow-sm">
<h3 className="text-sm font-black text-slate-800 dark:text-
slate-100 uppercase tracking-wider mb-4">Deteksi Keterlambatan Real-
Time</h3>
<div className="space-y-3">
{attendanceToday.filter(a => a.minutesLate > 0).map((a, i) =>
{
const emp = employees.find(e => e.nik === a.nik);
return (
<div key={i} className="flex justify-between items-center
p-3 rounded-xl bg-rose-50/50 dark:bg-rose-950/10 border border-rose-100
dark:border-rose-900/30">
<div className="flex items-center gap-2.5">
<img src={emp?.photoUrl} alt="" className="w-8 h-8
rounded-full object-cover" />
<div>
<p className="text-xs font-bold text-slate-800
dark:text-slate-100">{emp?.name}</p>
<p className="text-[10px] text-slate-
500">{emp?.division} • Jam Masuk: {a.checkIn}</p>
</div>
</div>
<span className="text-xs bg-rose-100 dark:bg-rose-950
text-rose-700 dark:text-rose-400 font-extrabold px-2 py-0.5 rounded">
+ {a.minutesLate} Menit
</span>
</div>
);
})}
{attendanceToday.filter(a => a.minutesLate > 0).length === 0
&& (
<p className="text-xs text-slate-500 py-4 text-center">Hari
ini tidak ada karyawan terlambat.</p>
)}
</div>
</div>
{/* Audit Log Overview */}
<div className="bg-white dark:bg-slate-900 border border-slate-
200 dark:border-slate-800 rounded-2xl p-6 shadow-sm">
<h3 className="text-sm font-black text-slate-800 dark:text-
slate-100 uppercase tracking-wider mb-4">Log Audit Aktivitas</h3>
<div className="space-y-3.5">
{attendanceToday.slice(0, 4).map((item, i) => {
// Generate some static representation
return (
<div key={i} className="flex gap-3 text-xs">
<Clock className="text-indigo-400 shrink-0" size={14}
/>
<div>
<span className="text-slate-500 font-medium">[09:{15
+ i*10} WIB]</span>{' '}
<span className="text-slate-800 dark:text-slate-200
font-bold">Kehadiran tercatat:</span>{' '}
<span className="text-slate-600 dark:text-slate-
400">Karyawan NIK EMP00{i+1} check-in berhasil.</span>
</div>
</div>
);
})}
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
);
}
function EmployeeView({ employees, setEmployees, divisions, currentRole,
addAuditLog }) {
const [searchTerm, setSearchTerm] = useState('');
const [filterDivision, setFilterDivision] = useState('Semua');
const [filterStatus, setFilterStatus] = useState('Semua');
const [showAddForm, setShowAddForm] = useState(false);
const [editingEmployee, setEditingEmployee] = useState(null);
// New Employee Form State
const [formState, setFormState] = useState({
nik: '', name: '', email: '', phone: '', address: '', joinDate: '',
status: 'Tetap', position: '', division: 'Waiter', baseSalary: 3200000,
isActive: true, photoUrl: ''
});
// Calculate work duration
const getMasaKerja = (joinDateStr) => {
const join = new Date(joinDateStr);
const now = new Date();
let diffYear = now.getFullYear() - join.getFullYear();
let diffMonth = now.getMonth() - join.getMonth();
if (diffMonth < 0) {
diffYear--;
diffMonth += 12;
}
return `${diffYear} Tahun ${diffMonth} Bulan`;
};
const handleSave = (e) => {
e.preventDefault();
if (editingEmployee) {
// Edit mode
setEmployees(employees.map(emp => emp.nik === editingEmployee.nik ?
{ ...formState } : emp));
addAuditLog(`Mengupdate data karyawan ${formState.name}
(${formState.nik})`);
setEditingEmployee(null);
} else {
// Add mode
// Auto-gen NIK
const nextNik = `EMP00${employees.length + 1}`;
const newEmp = { ...formState, nik: nextNik, photoUrl:
formState.photoUrl || 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1535713875002-
d1d0cf377fde?auto=format&fit=crop&q=80&w=150' };
setEmployees([...employees, newEmp]);
addAuditLog(`Menambahkan karyawan baru: ${formState.name}
(${nextNik})`);
}
setShowAddForm(false);
resetForm();
};
const resetForm = () => {
setFormState({
nik: '', name: '', email: '', phone: '', address: '', joinDate: '',
status: 'Tetap', position: '', division: 'Waiter', baseSalary: 3200000,
isActive: true, photoUrl: ''
});
};
const handleEditClick = (emp) => {
setEditingEmployee(emp);
setFormState(emp);
setShowAddForm(true);
};
const handleDelete = (nik) => {
if (confirm(`Apakah Anda yakin ingin menghapus data karyawan
${nik}?`)) {
setEmployees(employees.filter(emp => emp.nik !== nik));
addAuditLog(`Menghapus karyawan dengan NIK ${nik}`);
}
};
// Filter logic
const filteredEmployees = employees.filter(emp => {
const matchesSearch =
emp.name.toLowerCase().includes(searchTerm.toLowerCase()) ||
emp.nik.toLowerCase().includes(searchTerm.toLowerCase());
const matchesDiv = filterDivision === 'Semua' || emp.division ===
filterDivision;
const matchesStatus = filterStatus === 'Semua' || emp.status ===
filterStatus;
return matchesSearch && matchesDiv && matchesStatus;
});
return (
<div className="space-y-6">
{/* Title Panel */}
<div className="flex flex-col sm:flex-row sm:items-center
sm:justify-between gap-4">
<div>
<h2 className="text-2xl font-black text-slate-800 dark:text-
slate-100 flex items-center gap-2 tracking-tight">
Database Karyawan <span className="text-xs px-2.5 py-1
rounded bg-indigo-100 dark:bg-indigo-950 text-indigo-700 dark:text-
indigo-400 font-extrabold uppercase">Master Data</span>
</h2>
<p className="text-sm text-slate-500 dark:text-slate-
400">Kelola informasi legalitas karyawan, divisi, status kontrak, dan
upah pokok dasar.</p>
</div>
{/* Authorization Guard */}
{['Super Admin', 'HRD'].includes(currentRole) && (
<button
onClick={() => { resetForm(); setEditingEmployee(null);
setShowAddForm(true); }}
className="flex items-center gap-2 bg-indigo-600 hover:bg-
indigo-700 text-white px-4 py-2.5 rounded-xl font-bold text-sm shadow-md
shadow-indigo-600/20 transition self-start sm:self-auto"
>
<Plus size={16} />
<span>Karyawan Baru</span>
</button>
)}
</div>
{/* Live Form Creator/Editor Modals */}
{showAddForm && (
<div className="bg-white dark:bg-slate-900 border border-slate-
200 dark:border-slate-800 rounded-2xl p-6 shadow-md space-y-4">
<div className="flex justify-between items-center border-b pb-3
dark:border-slate-800">
<h3 className="text-sm font-black text-slate-800 dark:text-
slate-100 uppercase tracking-wider">
{editingEmployee ? 'Edit Profil Karyawan' : 'Registrasi
Karyawan Baru'}
</h3>
<button onClick={() => setShowAddForm(false)}
className="text-slate-400 hover:text-slate-600 dark:hover:text-slate-
200">
<X size={18} />
</button>
</div>
<form onSubmit={handleSave} className="grid grid-cols-1
md:grid-cols-3 gap-5">
<div className="space-y-1.5">
<label className="text-xs font-bold text-slate-500
dark:text-slate-400">Nama Lengkap</label>
<input
type="text" required value={formState.name} onChange={e
=> setFormState({...formState, name: e.target.value})}
className="w-full bg-slate-50 dark:bg-slate-800 border
border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-700 rounded-xl px-3 py-2 text-xs
focus:ring-indigo-500"
/>
</div>
<div className="space-y-1.5">
<label className="text-xs font-bold text-slate-500
dark:text-slate-400">Email Instansi</label>
<input
type="email" required value={formState.email} onChange={e
=> setFormState({...formState, email: e.target.value})}
className="w-full bg-slate-50 dark:bg-slate-800 border
border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-700 rounded-xl px-3 py-2 text-xs
focus:ring-indigo-500"
/>
</div>
<div className="space-y-1.5">
<label className="text-xs font-bold text-slate-500
dark:text-slate-400">Nomor HP</label>
<input
type="text" required value={formState.phone} onChange={e
=> setFormState({...formState, phone: e.target.value})}
className="w-full bg-slate-50 dark:bg-slate-800 border
border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-700 rounded-xl px-3 py-2 text-xs
focus:ring-indigo-500"
/>
</div>
<div className="space-y-1.5 md:col-span-3">
<label className="text-xs font-bold text-slate-500
dark:text-slate-400">Alamat Tempat Tinggal</label>
<textarea
rows="2" required value={formState.address} onChange={e
=> setFormState({...formState, address: e.target.value})}
className="w-full bg-slate-50 dark:bg-slate-800 border
border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-700 rounded-xl px-3 py-2 text-xs
focus:ring-indigo-500"
/>
</div>
<div className="space-y-1.5">
<label className="text-xs font-bold text-slate-500
dark:text-slate-400">Tanggal Mulai Kontrak/Masuk</label>
<input
type="date" required value={formState.joinDate}
onChange={e => setFormState({...formState, joinDate: e.target.value})}
className="w-full bg-slate-50 dark:bg-slate-800 border
border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-700 rounded-xl px-3 py-2 text-xs
focus:ring-indigo-500"
/>
</div>
<div className="space-y-1.5">
<label className="text-xs font-bold text-slate-500
dark:text-slate-400">Status Ikatan Kerja</label>
<select
value={formState.status} onChange={e =>
setFormState({...formState, status: e.target.value})}
className="w-full bg-slate-50 dark:bg-slate-800 border
border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-700 rounded-xl px-3 py-2 text-xs
focus:ring-indigo-500"
>
<option value="Tetap">Tetap</option>
<option value="Kontrak">Kontrak</option>
<option value="Magang">Magang</option>
</select>
</div>
<div className="space-y-1.5">
<label className="text-xs font-bold text-slate-500
dark:text-slate-400">Status Keaktifan</label>
<select
value={formState.isActive ? 'Aktif' : 'Nonaktif'}
onChange={e => setFormState({...formState, isActive:
e.target.value === 'Aktif'})}
className="w-full bg-slate-50 dark:bg-slate-800 border
border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-700 rounded-xl px-3 py-2 text-xs
focus:ring-indigo-500"
>
<option value="Aktif">Aktif</option>
<option value="Nonaktif">Nonaktif (Resigned)</option>
</select>
</div>
<div className="space-y-1.5">
<label className="text-xs font-bold text-slate-500
dark:text-slate-400">Divisi</label>
<select
value={formState.division} onChange={e =>
setFormState({...formState, division: e.target.value})}
className="w-full bg-slate-50 dark:bg-slate-800 border
border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-700 rounded-xl px-3 py-2 text-xs
focus:ring-indigo-500"
>
{divisions.map(div => <option key={div.id}
value={div.name}>{div.name}</option>)}
</select>
</div>
<div className="space-y-1.5">
<label className="text-xs font-bold text-slate-500
dark:text-slate-400">Jabatan Akademis/Fungsional</label>
<input
type="text" required value={formState.position}
onChange={e => setFormState({...formState, position: e.target.value})}
className="w-full bg-slate-50 dark:bg-slate-800 border
border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-700 rounded-xl px-3 py-2 text-xs
focus:ring-indigo-500"
/>
</div>
<div className="space-y-1.5">
<label className="text-xs font-bold text-slate-500
dark:text-slate-400">Gaji Pokok Dasar (IDR)</label>
<input
type="number" required value={formState.baseSalary}
onChange={e => setFormState({...formState, baseSalary:
parseInt(e.target.value) || 0})}
className="w-full bg-slate-50 dark:bg-slate-800 border
border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-700 rounded-xl px-3 py-2 text-xs
focus:ring-indigo-500"
/>
</div>
<div className="space-y-1.5 md:col-span-3">
<label className="text-xs font-bold text-slate-500
dark:text-slate-400">Foto URL (Opsional)</label>
<input
type="text" placeholder="https://..."
value={formState.photoUrl} onChange={e => setFormState({...formState,
photoUrl: e.target.value})}
className="w-full bg-slate-50 dark:bg-slate-800 border
border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-700 rounded-xl px-3 py-2 text-xs
focus:ring-indigo-500"
/>
</div>
<div className="md:col-span-3 flex justify-end gap-3 pt-3
border-t dark:border-slate-800">
<button
type="button" onClick={() => setShowAddForm(false)}
className="px-4 py-2 border border-slate-200 dark:border-
slate-700 text-slate-600 dark:text-slate-300 rounded-xl text-xs font-bold
hover:bg-slate-50 dark:hover:bg-slate-850"
>
Batal
</button>
<button
type="submit"
className="px-5 py-2 bg-indigo-600 hover:bg-indigo-700
text-white rounded-xl text-xs font-bold shadow-md shadow-indigo-600/10"
>
Simpan Data
</button>
</div>
</form>
</div>
)}
{/* Search, Filters, and Utilities Panel */}
<div className="bg-white dark:bg-slate-900 border border-slate-200
dark:border-slate-800 rounded-2xl p-4 shadow-sm flex flex-col md:flex-row
gap-4 items-center justify-between">
<div className="relative w-full md:w-80">
<Search className="absolute left-3.5 top-2.5 text-slate-400"
size={16} />
<input
type="text"
placeholder="Cari berdasarkan nama atau NIK..."
value={searchTerm}
onChange={(e) => setSearchTerm(e.target.value)}
className="w-full pl-10 pr-4 py-2 bg-slate-50 dark:bg-slate-
800 border border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-700 rounded-xl text-xs
focus:ring-indigo-500 outline-none"
/>
</div>
<div className="flex flex-wrap gap-3 w-full md:w-auto">
<select
value={filterDivision}
onChange={e => setFilterDivision(e.target.value)}
className="bg-slate-50 dark:bg-slate-800 border border-slate-
200 dark:border-slate-700 rounded-xl px-3 py-2 text-xs outline-none"
>
<option value="Semua">Semua Divisi</option>
{divisions.map(div => <option key={div.id}
value={div.name}>{div.name}</option>)}
</select>
<select
value={filterStatus}
onChange={e => setFilterStatus(e.target.value)}
className="bg-slate-50 dark:bg-slate-800 border border-slate-
200 dark:border-slate-700 rounded-xl px-3 py-2 text-xs outline-none"
>
<option value="Semua">Semua Ikatan</option>
<option value="Tetap">Tetap</option>
<option value="Kontrak">Kontrak</option>
<option value="Magang">Magang</option>
</select>
<button
onClick={() => alert('Fitur simulasi: Mengekspor file Excel
data karyawan sesuai standar HRIS.')}
className="flex items-center gap-1.5 px-3 py-2 border border-
slate-200 dark:border-slate-700 hover:bg-slate-50 dark:hover:bg-slate-800
rounded-xl text-xs font-bold text-slate-600 dark:text-slate-300
transition"
>
<FileSpreadsheet size={15} />
<span>Export Excel</span>
</button>
</div>
</div>
{/* Main Database Table Grid */}
<div className="bg-white dark:bg-slate-900 border border-slate-200
dark:border-slate-800 rounded-2xl shadow-sm overflow-hidden">
<div className="overflow-x-auto">
<table className="w-full text-left border-collapse">
<thead>
<tr className="bg-slate-50 dark:bg-slate-800/50 text-slate-
400 dark:text-slate-500 text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-wider
border-b border-slate-100 dark:border-slate-800">
<th className="p-4">Karyawan</th>
<th className="p-4">NIK</th>
<th className="p-4">Divisi & Jabatan</th>
<th className="p-4">Masa Kerja</th>
<th className="p-4">Gaji Pokok</th>
<th className="p-4">Status</th>
{['Super Admin', 'HRD'].includes(currentRole) && <th
className="p-4 text-center">Aksi</th>}
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody className="divide-y divide-slate-100 dark:divide-
slate-800 text-xs">
{filteredEmployees.map((emp) => (
<tr key={emp.nik} className="hover:bg-slate-50/50
dark:hover:bg-slate-800/20 transition">
<td className="p-4 flex items-center gap-3">
<img src={emp.photoUrl} alt="" className="w-9 h-9
rounded-full object-cover shadow-sm ring-2 ring-slate-100 dark:ring-
slate-800" />
<div>
<p className="font-extrabold text-slate-800
dark:text-slate-100 leading-tight">{emp.name}</p>
<p className="text-[10px] text-slate-
400">{emp.email}</p>
</div>
</td>
<td className="p-4 font-mono font-semibold text-slate-
500">{emp.nik}</td>
<td className="p-4">
<p className="font-bold text-indigo-600 dark:text-
indigo-400">{emp.division}</p>
<p className="text-[10px] text-slate-500 font-
medium">{emp.position}</p>
</td>
<td className="p-4 text-slate-600 dark:text-slate-400
font-medium">
{getMasaKerja(emp.joinDate)}
<span className="block text-[10px] text-slate-
400">Masuk: {emp.joinDate}</span>
</td>
<td className="p-4 font-bold text-slate-800 dark:text-
slate-100">
Rp {emp.baseSalary.toLocaleString('id-ID')}
</td>
<td className="p-4">
<div className="flex flex-col gap-1 items-start">
<span className={`px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full text-
[9px] font-black uppercase ${
emp.status === 'Tetap' ? 'bg-emerald-100 text-
emerald-700 dark:bg-emerald-950/40 dark:text-emerald-400' :
emp.status === 'Kontrak' ? 'bg-amber-100 text-
amber-700 dark:bg-amber-950/40 dark:text-amber-400' :
'bg-blue-100 text-blue-700 dark:bg-blue-950/40
dark:text-blue-400'
}`}>
{emp.status}
</span>
<span className={`text-[10px] font-semibold
${emp.isActive ? 'text-emerald-500' : 'text-slate-400'}`}>
{emp.isActive ? '• Aktif' : '• Resigned'}
</span>
</div>
</td>
{['Super Admin', 'HRD'].includes(currentRole) && (
<td className="p-4">
<div className="flex items-center justify-center
gap-2">
<button
onClick={() => handleEditClick(emp)}
className="p-1.5 rounded bg-slate-50 hover:bg-
slate-100 dark:bg-slate-800 dark:hover:bg-slate-700 text-slate-500
hover:text-slate-800 dark:hover:text-slate-200"
title="Edit"
>
<Edit size={14} />
</button>
<button
onClick={() => handleDelete(emp.nik)}
className="p-1.5 rounded bg-rose-50 hover:bg-
rose-100 dark:bg-rose-950/40 dark:hover:bg-rose-900/40 text-rose-500
hover:text-rose-700 dark:hover:text-rose-300"
title="Hapus"
>
<Trash2 size={14} />
</button>
</div>
</td>
)}
</tr>
))}
{filteredEmployees.length === 0 && (
<tr>
<td colSpan="7" className="text-center py-8 text-slate-
400 dark:text-slate-500 font-medium">
Karyawan tidak ditemukan. Silakan sesuaikan pencarian
atau filter Anda.
</td>
</tr>
)}
</tbody>
</table>
</div>
</div>
</div>
);
}
function AttendanceView({ employees, attendance, setAttendance,
companySettings, currentRole, addAuditLog }) {
const [activeDate, setActiveDate] = useState('2026-05-29');
const [showManualCheckIn, setShowManualCheckIn] = useState(false);
// State for manual check-in form
const [manualForm, setManualForm] = useState({ nik: 'EMP001', checkIn:
'09:30', checkOut: '18:00', status: 'Hadir' });
// Compute stats for activeDate
const listToday = attendance.filter(a => a.date === activeDate);
const presentCount = listToday.filter(a => a.status ===
'Hadir').length;
const lateCount = listToday.filter(a => a.minutesLate > 0).length;
// Process Late Minutes dynamically based on standard 09:30
const calculateLate = (checkInStr) => {
if (!checkInStr) return 0;
const [hrs, mins] = checkInStr.split(':').map(Number);
const checkInVal = hrs * 60 + mins;
const thresholdVal = 9 * 60 + 30; // 09:30
return checkInVal > thresholdVal ? checkInVal - thresholdVal : 0;
};
const handleManualSubmit = (e) => {
e.preventDefault();
const isLate = calculateLate(manualForm.checkIn);
// Check if record already exists
const exists = attendance.some(a => a.nik === manualForm.nik &&
a.date === activeDate);
if (exists) {
setAttendance(attendance.map(a =>
(a.nik === manualForm.nik && a.date === activeDate)
? { ...a, ...manualForm, minutesLate: isLate }
: a
));
addAuditLog(`Mengubah absensi manual: ${manualForm.nik} pada
${activeDate}`);
} else {
const newRecord = {
nik: manualForm.nik,
date: activeDate,
checkIn: manualForm.checkIn,
checkOut: manualForm.checkOut,
status: manualForm.status,
minutesLate: isLate
};
setAttendance([...attendance, newRecord]);
addAuditLog(`Menambahkan absensi manual baru: ${manualForm.nik}
pada ${activeDate}`);
}
setShowManualCheckIn(false);
};
return (
<div className="space-y-6">
{/* Title / Action Header */}
<div className="flex flex-col sm:flex-row sm:items-center
sm:justify-between gap-4">
<div>
<h2 className="text-2xl font-black text-slate-800 dark:text-
slate-100 flex items-center gap-2 tracking-tight">
Sistem Absensi Harian <span className="text-xs px-2.5 py-1
rounded bg-indigo-100 dark:bg-indigo-950 text-indigo-700 dark:text-
indigo-400 font-extrabold uppercase">Kehadiran</span>
</h2>
<p className="text-sm text-slate-500 dark:text-slate-
400">Default jam masuk standard: 09:30. Terlambat otomatis memotong gaji
kumulatif.</p>
</div>
{['Super Admin', 'HRD'].includes(currentRole) && (
<button
onClick={() => setShowManualCheckIn(true)}
className="flex items-center gap-2 bg-indigo-600 hover:bg-
indigo-700 text-white px-4 py-2.5 rounded-xl font-bold text-sm shadow-md
shadow-indigo-600/20 transition self-start sm:self-auto"
>
<Plus size={16} />
<span>Input Jam Manual</span>
</button>
)}
</div>
{/* Manual Input Attendance Form Section */}
{showManualCheckIn && (
<div className="bg-white dark:bg-slate-900 border border-slate-
200 dark:border-slate-800 rounded-2xl p-6 shadow-md space-y-4">
<div className="flex justify-between items-center border-b pb-3
dark:border-slate-800">
<h3 className="text-sm font-black text-slate-800 dark:text-
slate-100 uppercase tracking-wider">Form Input Kehadiran Manual</h3>
<button onClick={() => setShowManualCheckIn(false)}
className="text-slate-400 hover:text-slate-600 dark:hover:text-slate-
200">
<X size={18} />
</button>
</div>
<form onSubmit={handleManualSubmit} className="grid grid-cols-1
sm:grid-cols-4 gap-4">
<div className="space-y-1.5">
<label className="text-xs font-bold text-slate-500
dark:text-slate-400">Pilih Karyawan</label>
<select
value={manualForm.nik}
onChange={e => setManualForm({...manualForm, nik:
e.target.value})}
className="w-full bg-slate-50 dark:bg-slate-800 border
border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-700 rounded-xl px-3 py-2 text-xs
focus:ring-indigo-500 outline-none"
>
{employees.map(e => <option key={e.nik}
value={e.nik}>{e.nik} - {e.name}</option>)}
</select>
</div>
<div className="space-y-1.5">
<label className="text-xs font-bold text-slate-500
dark:text-slate-400">Status Kehadiran</label>
<select
value={manualForm.status}
onChange={e => setManualForm({...manualForm, status:
e.target.value})}
className="w-full bg-slate-50 dark:bg-slate-800 border
border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-700 rounded-xl px-3 py-2 text-xs
focus:ring-indigo-500 outline-none"
>
<option value="Hadir">Hadir (Kerja)</option>
<option value="Izin">Izin Teratur</option>
<option value="Sakit">Sakit (SKS)</option>
<option value="Alpha">Alpha (Tanpa Kabar)</option>
</select>
</div>
<div className="space-y-1.5">
<label className="text-xs font-bold text-slate-500
dark:text-slate-400">Jam Masuk (Check-In)</label>
<input
type="text" placeholder="Format 09:30"
value={manualForm.checkIn}
onChange={e => setManualForm({...manualForm, checkIn:
e.target.value})}
className="w-full bg-slate-50 dark:bg-slate-800 border
border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-700 rounded-xl px-3 py-2 text-xs
focus:ring-indigo-500 outline-none"
disabled={manualForm.status !== 'Hadir'}
/>
</div>
<div className="space-y-1.5">
<label className="text-xs font-bold text-slate-500
dark:text-slate-400">Jam Keluar (Check-Out)</label>
<input
type="text" placeholder="Format 18:00"
value={manualForm.checkOut}
onChange={e => setManualForm({...manualForm, checkOut:
e.target.value})}
className="w-full bg-slate-50 dark:bg-slate-800 border
border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-700 rounded-xl px-3 py-2 text-xs
focus:ring-indigo-500 outline-none"
disabled={manualForm.status !== 'Hadir'}
/>
</div>
<div className="sm:col-span-4 flex justify-end gap-3 pt-3
border-t dark:border-slate-800">
<button
type="button" onClick={() => setShowManualCheckIn(false)}
className="px-4 py-2 border border-slate-200 dark:border-
slate-700 text-slate-600 dark:text-slate-300 rounded-xl text-xs font-bold
hover:bg-slate-50 dark:hover:bg-slate-850"
>
Batal
</button>
<button
type="submit"
className="px-5 py-2 bg-indigo-600 hover:bg-indigo-700
text-white rounded-xl text-xs font-bold shadow-md shadow-indigo-600/10"
>
Kunci Log Absen
</button>
</div>
</form>
</div>
)}
{/* Stats Cards Row */}
<div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-6">
<div className="bg-white dark:bg-slate-900 border border-slate-
200 dark:border-slate-800 rounded-2xl p-5 shadow-sm">
<p className="text-xs font-bold text-slate-400 uppercase
tracking-wider">Tanggal Kerja Terpilih</p>
<div className="flex items-center gap-2 mt-1">
<Calendar className="text-indigo-500" size={16} />
<input
type="date" value={activeDate} onChange={e =>
setActiveDate(e.target.value)}
className="bg-transparent border-none text-md font-
extrabold focus:ring-0 text-slate-800 dark:text-slate-100 outline-none
cursor-pointer"
/>
</div>
</div>
<div className="bg-white dark:bg-slate-900 border border-slate-
200 dark:border-slate-800 rounded-2xl p-5 shadow-sm flex justify-between
items-center">
<div>
<p className="text-xs font-bold text-slate-400 uppercase
tracking-wider">Karyawan Hadir Hari Ini</p>
<h4 className="text-xl font-black text-slate-800 dark:text-
slate-100 mt-1">{presentCount} Orang</h4>
</div>
<span className="w-2.5 h-2.5 rounded-full bg-emerald-500
animate-pulse"></span>
</div>
<div className="bg-white dark:bg-slate-900 border border-slate-
200 dark:border-slate-800 rounded-2xl p-5 shadow-sm flex justify-between
items-center">
<div>
<p className="text-xs font-bold text-slate-400 uppercase
tracking-wider">Insiden Keterlambatan</p>
<h4 className="text-xl font-black text-rose-600 dark:text-
rose-400 mt-1">{lateCount} Kasus</h4>
</div>
<AlertCircle className="text-rose-500" size={18} />
</div>
</div>
{/* Main Database Table Container */}
<div className="bg-white dark:bg-slate-900 border border-slate-200
dark:border-slate-800 rounded-2xl shadow-sm overflow-hidden">
<div className="p-4 border-b border-slate-100 dark:border-slate-
800 flex justify-between items-center">
<h3 className="text-xs font-bold text-slate-400 uppercase
tracking-wider">Lembar Kehadiran Tanggal: {activeDate}</h3>
</div>
<div className="overflow-x-auto">
<table className="w-full text-left border-collapse">
<thead>
<tr className="bg-slate-50 dark:bg-slate-800/50 text-slate-
400 dark:text-slate-500 text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-wider
border-b border-slate-100 dark:border-slate-800">
<th className="p-4">Karyawan</th>
<th className="p-4">NIK</th>
<th className="p-4">Jam Masuk</th>
<th className="p-4">Jam Keluar</th>
<th className="p-4">Keterlambatan</th>
<th className="p-4">Status</th>
<th className="p-4 text-center">Tindakan Cepat</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody className="divide-y divide-slate-100 dark:divide-
slate-800 text-xs">
{employees.map((emp) => {
const log = attendance.find(a => a.nik === emp.nik &&
a.date === activeDate);
const isLate = log && log.minutesLate > 0;
return (
<tr key={emp.nik} className="hover:bg-slate-50/50
dark:hover:bg-slate-800/20 transition">
<td className="p-4 flex items-center gap-3">
<img src={emp.photoUrl} alt="" className="w-8 h-8
rounded-full object-cover" />
<div>
<p className="font-extrabold text-slate-800
dark:text-slate-100 leading-tight">{emp.name}</p>
<p className="text-[10px] text-indigo-
500">{emp.division}</p>
</div>
</td>
<td className="p-4 font-mono text-slate-
500">{emp.nik}</td>
<td className="p-4 text-slate-700 dark:text-slate-300
font-semibold">{log?.checkIn || '--:--'}</td>
<td className="p-4 text-slate-700 dark:text-slate-300
font-semibold">{log?.checkOut || '--:--'}</td>
<td className="p-4 font-bold">
{isLate ? (
<span className="text-rose-600 dark:text-rose-400
bg-rose-50 dark:bg-rose-950/40 px-2.5 py-1 rounded">
Terlambat {log.minutesLate} mnt
</span>
) : log?.status === 'Hadir' ? (
<span className="text-emerald-600 dark:text-
emerald-400 bg-emerald-50 dark:bg-emerald-950/40 px-2.5 py-1 rounded">
Tepat Waktu
</span>
) : '--'}
</td>
<td className="p-4">
{log ? (
<span className={`px-2.5 py-1 rounded-full text-
[9px] font-black uppercase ${
log.status === 'Hadir' ? 'bg-emerald-100 text-
emerald-700 dark:bg-emerald-950/40 dark:text-emerald-400' :
log.status === 'Izin' ? 'bg-blue-100 text-blue-
700 dark:bg-blue-950/40 dark:text-blue-400' :
log.status === 'Sakit' ? 'bg-amber-100 text-
amber-700 dark:bg-amber-950/40 dark:text-amber-400' :
'bg-red-100 text-red-700 dark:bg-red-950/40
dark:text-red-400'
}`}>
{log.status}
</span>
) : (
<span className="text-slate-400 font-bold bg-
slate-100 dark:bg-slate-850 px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-[10px]">
Belum Absen
</span>
)}
</td>
<td className="p-4 text-center">
<div className="flex justify-center gap-1.5">
<button
onClick={() => {
const exists = attendance.some(a => a.nik ===
emp.nik && a.date === activeDate);
const updatedRecord = { nik: emp.nik, date:
activeDate, checkIn: '09:15', checkOut: '18:00', status: 'Hadir',
minutesLate: 0 };
if (exists) {
setAttendance(attendance.map(a => (a.nik
=== emp.nik && a.date === activeDate) ? updatedRecord : a));
} else {
setAttendance([...attendance,
updatedRecord]);
}
addAuditLog(`Quick sign-in Hadir untuk
${emp.name} (${emp.nik})`);
}}
className="px-2 py-1 bg-emerald-50 hover:bg-
emerald-100 dark:bg-emerald-950/30 text-emerald-600 dark:text-emerald-400
border border-emerald-200 dark:border-emerald-800 text-[10px] font-bold
rounded-lg transition"
>
Hadir
</button>
<button
onClick={() => {
const exists = attendance.some(a => a.nik ===
emp.nik && a.date === activeDate);
const updatedRecord = { nik: emp.nik, date:
activeDate, checkIn: '', checkOut: '', status: 'Izin', minutesLate: 0 };
if (exists) {
setAttendance(attendance.map(a => (a.nik
=== emp.nik && a.date === activeDate) ? updatedRecord : a));
} else {
setAttendance([...attendance,
updatedRecord]);
}
addAuditLog(`Quick set Izin untuk ${emp.name}
(${emp.nik})`);
}}
className="px-2 py-1 bg-amber-50 hover:bg-
amber-100 dark:bg-amber-950/30 text-amber-600 dark:text-amber-400 border
border-amber-200 dark:border-amber-800 text-[10px] font-bold rounded-lg
transition"
>
Izin
</button>
</div>
</td>
</tr>
);
})}
</tbody>
</table>
</div>
</div>
</div>
);
}
function PayrollView({ employees, payrolls, setPayrolls, allowances,
deductions, currentRole, addAuditLog, companySettings }) {
const [selectedMonth, setSelectedMonth] = useState('Mei 2026');
const [activeSlip, setActiveSlip] = useState(null); // Detailed preview
object for the visual PDF generator
const [showSlipViewer, setShowSlipViewer] = useState(false);
// Auto-generate current month payroll draft for all staff
const handleGeneratePayrollBatch = () => {
const confirmation = confirm(`Apakah Anda yakin ingin melakukan
generate payroll otomatis untuk bulan ${selectedMonth}?`);
if (!confirmation) return;
const newSlips = employees.map((emp, index) => {
const base = emp.baseSalary;
// Calculate static variables
const sumAllowances = allowances.reduce((sum, curr) => sum +
curr.amount, 0);
const sumDeductions = deductions.reduce((sum, curr) => {
if (curr.id === 'ded_late') return sum; // Handle late cases
dynamically
return sum + curr.amount;
}, 0);
const net = base + sumAllowances - sumDeductions + 150000; //
adding minor variable overtime
return {
id: `PAY-202605-0${index + 4}`,
nik: emp.nik,
name: emp.name,
division: emp.division,
month: selectedMonth,
baseSalary: base,
allowance: sumAllowances,
deduction: sumDeductions,
bonus: 200000,
overtime: 150000,
netSalary: net,
status: 'Pending Approval',
approvedBy: '',
approvedDate: ''
};
});
setPayrolls([...payrolls, ...newSlips]);
addAuditLog(`Melakukan batch-generate payroll draf bulan
${selectedMonth}`);
alert(`Berhasil membuat ${newSlips.length} lembar draf slip gaji
untuk diulas!`);
};
const handleApprovePayroll = (id) => {
setPayrolls(payrolls.map(pay => {
if (pay.id === id) {
return {
...pay,
status: 'Approved',
approvedBy: 'Yusuf (Manager)',
approvedDate: new Date().toISOString().substring(0, 10)
};
}
return pay;
}));
addAuditLog(`Menyetujui slip payroll ID: ${id}`);
alert('Slip Gaji berhasil disetujui untuk pencairan!');
};
const openSlipGajiPDF = (slip) => {
setActiveSlip(slip);
setShowSlipViewer(true);
};
return (
<div className="space-y-6">
{/* Title Header */}
<div className="flex flex-col sm:flex-row sm:items-center
sm:justify-between gap-4">
<div>
<h2 className="text-2xl font-black text-slate-800 dark:text-
slate-100 flex items-center gap-2 tracking-tight">
Pemrosesan Payroll <span className="text-xs px-2.5 py-1
rounded bg-indigo-100 dark:bg-indigo-950 text-indigo-700 dark:text-
indigo-400 font-extrabold uppercase">Engine</span>
</h2>
<p className="text-sm text-slate-500 dark:text-slate-
400">Generate slip gaji otomatis terintegrasi dengan data divisi,
tunjangan dan potongan legal.</p>
</div>
{/* Security / Role Lock: Admin & HRD can calculate */}
{['Super Admin', 'HRD'].includes(currentRole) && (
<button
onClick={handleGeneratePayrollBatch}
className="flex items-center gap-2 bg-indigo-600 hover:bg-
indigo-700 text-white px-4 py-2.5 rounded-xl font-bold text-sm shadow-md
shadow-indigo-600/20 transition self-start sm:self-auto"
>
<RefreshCw size={15} className="animate-spin" />
<span>Batch Generate Payroll</span>
</button>
)}
</div>
{/* Modern PDF Salary Slip Visualizer Modal */}
{showSlipViewer && activeSlip && (
<div className="bg-slate-900/45 fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-
center justify-center p-4 overflow-y-auto">
<div className="bg-white dark:bg-slate-900 border border-slate-
200 dark:border-slate-800 rounded-2xl w-full max-w-3xl p-8 shadow-2xl
relative space-y-6 text-slate-800 dark:text-slate-100">
{/* Modal Closer Header */}
<div className="flex justify-between items-center border-b
pb-4 dark:border-slate-800">
<span className="text-xs font-black text-indigo-600
dark:text-indigo-400 uppercase tracking-widest flex items-center gap-1">
<Shield size={14} /> Kertas Slip Gaji Digital / E-Slip
</span>
<button onClick={() => setShowSlipViewer(false)}
className="p-1.5 rounded-full bg-slate-100 dark:bg-slate-800 text-slate-
500 hover:text-slate-800 dark:hover:text-slate-200">
<X size={18} />
</button>
</div>
{/* A4 Paper Simulated Section */}
<div className="border border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-800
p-6 sm:p-8 rounded-xl bg-slate-50 dark:bg-slate-950 font-serif relative
overflow-hidden" id="print-slip-area">
{/* Decorative Watermark background */}
<div className="absolute inset-0 opacity-5 pointer-events-
none flex items-center justify-center">
<Building size={350} />
</div>
{/* Company Logo Header */}
<div className="flex flex-col sm:flex-row justify-between
items-start sm:items-center gap-4 border-b pb-5 dark:border-slate-800">
<div className="flex items-center gap-3">
<div className="w-12 h-12 bg-indigo-600 rounded
overflow-hidden">
<img src={companySettings.logoUrl} alt="Logo"
className="w-full h-full object-cover" />
</div>
<div className="font-sans">
<h4 className="font-black text-sm tracking-wide text-
slate-900 dark:text-white">{companySettings.name}</h4>
<p className="text-[10px] text-slate-
500">{companySettings.address}</p>
</div>
</div>
<div className="text-left sm:text-right font-sans">
<h3 className="text-lg font-black text-indigo-600
dark:text-indigo-400 uppercase tracking-wider">SLIP GAJI RESMI</h3>
<p className="text-xs text-slate-500">Bulan
Operasional: {activeSlip.month}</p>
<p className="text-[9px] text-slate-400 font-mono mt-
0.5">ID Slip: {activeSlip.id}</p>
</div>
</div>
{/* Employee Metadata */}
<div className="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 gap-4 my-6
text-xs font-sans pb-4 border-b dark:border-slate-800">
<div className="space-y-1">
<p className="text-slate-500">Diterbitkan Kepada:</p>
<p className="font-black text-slate-800 dark:text-white
text-sm">{activeSlip.name}</p>
<p className="text-slate-600 dark:text-slate-300">NIK:
{activeSlip.nik}</p>
</div>
<div className="space-y-1 text-left sm:text-right">
<p className="text-slate-500">Struktur Kerja:</p>
<p className="font-bold text-slate-800 dark:text-
white">Divisi {activeSlip.division}</p>
<p className="text-slate-600 dark:text-slate-
300">Pekerjaan: Staff Operasional</p>
</div>
</div>
{/* Breakdown Columns */}
<div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-6 font-
sans text-xs pt-2">
{/* INCOMES / PENERIMAAN */}
<div className="space-y-3">
<h5 className="font-black text-slate-800 dark:text-
white border-b pb-1 text-xs uppercase tracking-wider text-indigo-600
dark:text-indigo-400">Penerimaan (A)</h5>
<div className="space-y-2">
<div className="flex justify-between">
<span className="text-slate-600 dark:text-slate-
400">Gaji Pokok Dasar</span>
<span className="font-semibold text-slate-850
dark:text-slate-200">Rp {activeSlip.baseSalary.toLocaleString('id-
ID')}</span>
</div>
<div className="flex justify-between">
<span className="text-slate-600 dark:text-slate-
400">Tunjangan Jabatan & Transport</span>
<span className="font-semibold text-slate-850
dark:text-slate-200">Rp {activeSlip.allowance.toLocaleString('id-
ID')}</span>
</div>
<div className="flex justify-between">
<span className="text-slate-600 dark:text-slate-
400">Lembur Operasional</span>
<span className="font-semibold text-slate-850
dark:text-slate-200">Rp {activeSlip.overtime.toLocaleString('id-
ID')}</span>
</div>
<div className="flex justify-between">
<span className="text-slate-600 dark:text-slate-
400">Insentif / Bonus</span>
<span className="font-semibold text-slate-850
dark:text-slate-200">Rp {activeSlip.bonus.toLocaleString('id-ID')}</span>
</div>
</div>
</div>
{/* DEDUCTIONS / POTONGAN */}
<div className="space-y-3">
<h5 className="font-black text-slate-800 dark:text-
white border-b pb-1 text-xs uppercase tracking-wider text-rose-600
dark:text-rose-400">Potongan (B)</h5>
<div className="space-y-2">
<div className="flex justify-between">
<span className="text-slate-600 dark:text-slate-
400">BPJS Ketenagakerjaan (2%)</span>
<span className="font-semibold text-slate-850
dark:text-slate-200">Rp 120.000</span>
</div>
<div className="flex justify-between">
<span className="text-slate-600 dark:text-slate-
400">Pajak PPh 21 Standar</span>
<span className="font-semibold text-slate-850
dark:text-slate-200">Rp {activeSlip.deduction.toLocaleString('id-
ID')}</span>
</div>
<div className="flex justify-between">
<span className="text-slate-600 dark:text-slate-
400">Kasbon / Denda Lambat</span>
<span className="font-semibold text-slate-850
dark:text-slate-200">Rp 0</span>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
{/* Total Summary Footer of Slip */}
<div className="mt-8 pt-4 border-t-2 border-dashed border-
slate-300 dark:border-slate-700 font-sans flex flex-col sm:flex-row
justify-between items-start sm:items-center gap-4">
<div>
<h4 className="text-[10px] text-slate-400 uppercase
tracking-wider font-bold">Gaji Bersih Diterima (Net Pay)</h4>
<p className="text-2xl font-black text-slate-900
dark:text-white">Rp {activeSlip.netSalary.toLocaleString('id-ID')}</p>
</div>
<div className="text-left sm:text-right text-[10px] text-
slate-500 space-y-0.5">
<p>Disetujui Oleh: <span className="font-bold text-
indigo-500">{activeSlip.approvedBy || 'Dalam Antrean'}</span></p>
<p>Status Pembayaran: <span className="font-extrabold
text-emerald-500">Ditransfer Sukses</span></p>
</div>
</div>
</div>
{/* Action Buttons */}
<div className="flex justify-end gap-3 pt-4 border-t
dark:border-slate-800 text-xs">
<button
onClick={() => alert('Fitur simulasi: Mengirimkan dokumen
PDF ini ke alamat email karyawan.')}
className="flex items-center gap-1.5 px-4 py-2 border
border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-700 hover:bg-slate-50 dark:hover:bg-
slate-800 rounded-xl font-bold text-slate-600 dark:text-slate-300
transition"
>
<Send size={15} />
<span>Kirim E-slip via Email</span>
</button>
<button
onClick={() => window.print()}
className="flex items-center gap-1.5 px-5 py-2.5 bg-
indigo-600 hover:bg-indigo-700 text-white rounded-xl font-bold shadow-md
shadow-indigo-600/10 transition"
>
<Printer size={15} />
<span>Cetak / Download PDF</span>
</button>
</div>
</div>
</div>
)}
{/* Main Database Table Grid for Payroll Processing */}
<div className="bg-white dark:bg-slate-900 border border-slate-200
dark:border-slate-800 rounded-2xl shadow-sm overflow-hidden">
{/* Table Search Header */}
<div className="p-4 border-b border-slate-100 dark:border-slate-
800 flex flex-col sm:flex-row gap-4 items-center justify-between">
<div className="flex items-center gap-2">
<span className="text-xs font-bold text-slate-500 dark:text-
slate-400">Bulan Kerja:</span>
<select
value={selectedMonth}
onChange={e => setSelectedMonth(e.target.value)}
className="bg-slate-50 dark:bg-slate-850 border border-
slate-200 dark:border-slate-700 rounded-lg px-3 py-1.5 text-xs font-bold
text-slate-800 dark:text-white outline-none"
>
<option value="Mei 2026">Mei 2026</option>
<option value="April 2026">April 2026</option>
</select>
</div>
</div>
<div className="overflow-x-auto">
<table className="w-full text-left border-collapse">
<thead>
<tr className="bg-slate-50 dark:bg-slate-800/50 text-slate-
400 dark:text-slate-500 text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-wider
border-b border-slate-100 dark:border-slate-800">
<th className="p-4">Karyawan</th>
<th className="p-4">Komponen Gaji</th>
<th className="p-4">Tunjangan</th>
<th className="p-4">Potongan Pajak</th>
<th className="p-4">Gaji Bersih</th>
<th className="p-4">Status & Verifikator</th>
<th className="p-4 text-center">Tindakan</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody className="divide-y divide-slate-100 dark:divide-
slate-800 text-xs">
{payrolls.filter(p => p.month === selectedMonth).map((slip)
=> (
<tr key={slip.id} className="hover:bg-slate-50/50
dark:hover:bg-slate-800/20 transition">
<td className="p-4">
<p className="font-extrabold text-slate-800
dark:text-slate-100 leading-tight">{slip.name}</p>
<p className="text-[10px] text-slate-400">{slip.nik}
• {slip.division}</p>
</td>
<td className="p-4 font-medium text-slate-700
dark:text-slate-300">
Rp {slip.baseSalary.toLocaleString('id-ID')}
</td>
<td className="p-4 text-emerald-600 font-semibold">
+Rp {(slip.allowance + slip.overtime +
slip.bonus).toLocaleString('id-ID')}
</td>
<td className="p-4 text-rose-600 font-semibold">
-Rp {slip.deduction.toLocaleString('id-ID')}
</td>
<td className="p-4 font-black text-slate-900 dark:text-
white">
Rp {slip.netSalary.toLocaleString('id-ID')}
</td>
<td className="p-4">
<div className="flex flex-col gap-0.5">
<span className={`px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full text-
[9px] font-black uppercase w-max ${
slip.status === 'Approved' ? 'bg-emerald-100
text-emerald-700 dark:bg-emerald-950/40 dark:text-emerald-400' : 'bg-
amber-100 text-amber-700 dark:bg-amber-950/40 dark:text-amber-400'
}`}>
{slip.status}
</span>
{slip.status === 'Approved' && (
<span className="text-[9px] text-slate-
400">Verifikator: {slip.approvedBy}</span>
)}
</div>
</td>
<td className="p-4">
<div className="flex items-center justify-center gap-
1.5">
<button
onClick={() => openSlipGajiPDF(slip)}
className="px-2.5 py-1.5 bg-slate-100 hover:bg-
slate-200 dark:bg-slate-800 dark:hover:bg-slate-700 text-slate-600
dark:text-slate-300 text-[10px] font-bold rounded-lg transition flex
items-center gap-1"
title="Lihat Slip"
>
<FileText size={12} />
<span>Detail Slip</span>
</button>
{/* Manager or Super Admin approval required */}
{slip.status !== 'Approved' && ['Super Admin',
'Manager'].includes(currentRole) && (
<button
onClick={() => handleApprovePayroll(slip.id)}
className="px-2.5 py-1.5 bg-indigo-600
hover:bg-indigo-700 text-white text-[10px] font-bold rounded-lg
transition flex items-center gap-1"
>
<Check size={12} />
<span>Approve</span>
</button>
)}
</div>
</td>
</tr>
))}
</tbody>
</table>
</div>
</div>
</div>
);
}
function AllowanceDeductionView({ allowanceSettings,
setAllowanceSettings, deductionSettings, setDeductionSettings,
currentRole, addAuditLog }) {
const [showAddAllowance, setShowAddAllowance] = useState(false);
const [showAddDeduction, setShowAddDeduction] = useState(false);
const [allForm, setAllForm] = useState({ name: '', amount: 100000,
type: 'Tetap' });
const [dedForm, setDedForm] = useState({ name: '', amount: 50000, type:
'Tetap' });
const handleAddAllowance = (e) => {
e.preventDefault();
const newAllowance = {
id: `all_${Date.now()}`,
...allForm
};
setAllowanceSettings([...allowanceSettings, newAllowance]);
addAuditLog(`Menambahkan Master Tunjangan Baru: ${allForm.name}`);
setShowAddAllowance(false);
setAllForm({ name: '', amount: 100000, type: 'Tetap' });
};
const handleAddDeduction = (e) => {
e.preventDefault();
const newDeduction = {
id: `ded_${Date.now()}`,
...dedForm
};
setDeductionSettings([...deductionSettings, newDeduction]);
addAuditLog(`Menambahkan Master Potongan Baru: ${dedForm.name}`);
setShowAddDeduction(false);
setDedForm({ name: '', amount: 50000, type: 'Tetap' });
};
const deleteAllowance = (id) => {
if (confirm('Apakah Anda yakin ingin menghapus tunjangan ini?')) {
setAllowanceSettings(allowanceSettings.filter(a => a.id !== id));
addAuditLog(`Menghapus Tunjangan ID: ${id}`);
}
};
const deleteDeduction = (id) => {
if (confirm('Apakah Anda yakin ingin menghapus potongan ini?')) {
setDeductionSettings(deductionSettings.filter(d => d.id !== id));
addAuditLog(`Menghapus Potongan ID: ${id}`);
}
};
return (
<div className="space-y-6">
{/* Title Header */}
<div>
<h2 className="text-2xl font-black text-slate-800 dark:text-
slate-100 flex items-center gap-2 tracking-tight">
Komponen Tunjangan & Potongan <span className="text-xs px-2.5
py-1 rounded bg-indigo-100 dark:bg-indigo-950 text-indigo-700 dark:text-
indigo-400 font-extrabold uppercase">Fringe Benefits</span>
</h2>
<p className="text-sm text-slate-500 dark:text-slate-400">Atur
komponen penambah dan pengurang upah untuk diintegrasikan secara global
pada lembar payroll.</p>
</div>
<div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-6">
{/* ALLOWANCE MANAGEMENT */}
<div className="bg-white dark:bg-slate-900 border border-slate-
200 dark:border-slate-800 rounded-2xl p-6 shadow-sm space-y-4">
<div className="flex justify-between items-center border-b pb-3
dark:border-slate-800">
<h3 className="text-sm font-black text-slate-800 dark:text-
slate-100 uppercase tracking-wider">Tabel Master Tunjangan</h3>
{['Super Admin', 'HRD'].includes(currentRole) && (
<button
onClick={() => setShowAddAllowance(true)}
className="flex items-center gap-1.5 text-xs font-bold
text-indigo-600 dark:text-indigo-400 hover:underline"
>
<Plus size={14} /> Tambah Baru
</button>
)}
</div>
{showAddAllowance && (
<form onSubmit={handleAddAllowance} className="p-4 rounded-xl
bg-slate-50 dark:bg-slate-850 border border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-
800 space-y-3">
<div className="space-y-1">
<label className="text-[10px] font-bold text-slate-500
uppercase">Nama Tunjangan</label>
<input
type="text" required value={allForm.name} onChange={e
=> setAllForm({...allForm, name: e.target.value})}
className="w-full bg-white dark:bg-slate-900 border
border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-700 rounded-lg px-2.5 py-1.5 text-xs
outline-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-indigo-500"
/>
</div>
<div className="space-y-1">
<label className="text-[10px] font-bold text-slate-500
uppercase">Nilai Tunai (IDR)</label>
<input
type="number" required value={allForm.amount}
onChange={e => setAllForm({...allForm, amount: parseInt(e.target.value)
|| 0})}
className="w-full bg-white dark:bg-slate-900 border
border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-700 rounded-lg px-2.5 py-1.5 text-xs
outline-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-indigo-500"
/>
</div>
<div className="flex justify-end gap-2 pt-1">
<button type="button" onClick={() =>
setShowAddAllowance(false)} className="px-3 py-1 text-[10px] font-bold
text-slate-500">Batal</button>
<button type="submit" className="px-3 py-1 bg-indigo-600
text-white rounded text-[10px] font-bold">Simpan</button>
</div>
</form>
)}
<div className="space-y-3">
{allowanceSettings.map((item) => (
<div key={item.id} className="flex justify-between items-
center p-3 rounded-xl bg-slate-50 dark:bg-slate-850/50 border border-
slate-100 dark:border-slate-800">
<div>
<p className="font-bold text-slate-800 dark:text-slate-
100">{item.name}</p>
<span className="text-[10px] text-indigo-500 font-
semibold">{item.type}</span>
</div>
<div className="flex items-center gap-3">
<span className="font-bold text-slate-800 dark:text-
slate-200">Rp {item.amount.toLocaleString('id-ID')}</span>
{['Super Admin', 'HRD'].includes(currentRole) && (
<button onClick={() => deleteAllowance(item.id)}
className="text-slate-400 hover:text-rose-500">
<Trash2 size={14} />
</button>
)}
</div>
</div>
))}
</div>
</div>
{/* DEDUCTION MANAGEMENT */}
<div className="bg-white dark:bg-slate-900 border border-slate-
200 dark:border-slate-800 rounded-2xl p-6 shadow-sm space-y-4">
<div className="flex justify-between items-center border-b pb-3
dark:border-slate-800">
<h3 className="text-sm font-black text-slate-800 dark:text-
slate-100 uppercase tracking-wider">Tabel Master Potongan</h3>
{['Super Admin', 'HRD'].includes(currentRole) && (
<button
onClick={() => setShowAddDeduction(true)}
className="flex items-center gap-1.5 text-xs font-bold
text-indigo-600 dark:text-indigo-400 hover:underline"
>
<Plus size={14} /> Tambah Baru
</button>
)}
</div>
{showAddDeduction && (
<form onSubmit={handleAddDeduction} className="p-4 rounded-xl
bg-slate-50 dark:bg-slate-850 border border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-
800 space-y-3">
<div className="space-y-1">
<label className="text-[10px] font-bold text-slate-500
uppercase">Nama Potongan</label>
<input
type="text" required value={dedForm.name} onChange={e
=> setDedForm({...dedForm, name: e.target.value})}
className="w-full bg-white dark:bg-slate-900 border
border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-700 rounded-lg px-2.5 py-1.5 text-xs
outline-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-indigo-500"
/>
</div>
<div className="space-y-1">
<label className="text-[10px] font-bold text-slate-500
uppercase">Nilai Potongan (IDR)</label>
<input
type="number" required value={dedForm.amount}
onChange={e => setDedForm({...dedForm, amount: parseInt(e.target.value)
|| 0})}
className="w-full bg-white dark:bg-slate-900 border
border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-700 rounded-lg px-2.5 py-1.5 text-xs
outline-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-indigo-500"
/>
</div>
<div className="flex justify-end gap-2 pt-1">
<button type="button" onClick={() =>
setShowAddDeduction(false)} className="px-3 py-1 text-[10px] font-bold
text-slate-500">Batal</button>
<button type="submit" className="px-3 py-1 bg-indigo-600
text-white rounded text-[10px] font-bold">Simpan</button>
</div>
</form>
)}
<div className="space-y-3">
{deductionSettings.map((item) => (
<div key={item.id} className="flex justify-between items-
center p-3 rounded-xl bg-slate-50 dark:bg-slate-850/50 border border-
slate-100 dark:border-slate-800">
<div>
<p className="font-bold text-slate-800 dark:text-slate-
100">{item.name}</p>
<span className="text-[10px] text-rose-500 font-
semibold">{item.type}</span>
</div>
<div className="flex items-center gap-3">
<span className="font-bold text-slate-800 dark:text-
slate-200">
{item.id === 'ded_late' ? `Rp
${item.amount.toLocaleString('id-ID')}/mnt` : `Rp
${item.amount.toLocaleString('id-ID')}`}
</span>
{['Super Admin', 'HRD'].includes(currentRole) && (
<button onClick={() => deleteDeduction(item.id)}
className="text-slate-400 hover:text-rose-500">
<Trash2 size={14} />
</button>
)}
</div>
</div>
))}
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
);
}
function ReportsView({ employees, payrolls, attendance, divisions }) {
const [selectedReportType, setSelectedReportType] =
useState('Payroll');
const [startDate, setStartDate] = useState('2026-05-01');
const [endDate, setEndDate] = useState('2026-05-31');
// Metrik Kompilasi
const aggregateDivSalary = divisions.map(div => {
const totalSalary = employees.filter(e => e.division ===
div.name).reduce((sum, e) => sum + e.baseSalary, 0);
return {
division: div.name,
totalSalary
};
});
return (
<div className="space-y-6">
{/* Title Header */}
<div>
<h2 className="text-2xl font-black text-slate-800 dark:text-
slate-100 flex items-center gap-2 tracking-tight">
Laporan Finansial & HRD <span className="text-xs px-2.5 py-1
rounded bg-indigo-100 dark:bg-indigo-950 text-indigo-700 dark:text-
indigo-400 font-extrabold uppercase">Reports Hub</span>
</h2>
<p className="text-sm text-slate-500 dark:text-slate-
400">Rekonsiliasi data operasional divisi dan pengeluaran berkas payroll
secara lengkap.</p>
</div>
{/* Filter and selector */}
<div className="bg-white dark:bg-slate-900 border border-slate-200
dark:border-slate-800 rounded-2xl p-6 shadow-sm flex flex-col md:flex-row
gap-5 items-center justify-between">
<div className="flex flex-wrap gap-4 items-center">
<div>
<span className="text-[10px] font-black uppercase text-slate-
400 block mb-1">Pilih Jenis Laporan</span>
<select
value={selectedReportType}
onChange={e => setSelectedReportType(e.target.value)}
className="bg-slate-50 dark:bg-slate-800 border border-
slate-200 dark:border-slate-700 rounded-xl px-3 py-2 text-xs font-
semibold outline-none"
>
<option value="Payroll">Laporan Penggajian
(Payroll)</option>
<option value="Attendance">Laporan Rekapitulasi
Absensi</option>
<option value="Division">Laporan Distribusi Anggaran
Divisi</option>
</select>
</div>
<div>
<span className="text-[10px] font-black uppercase text-slate-
400 block mb-1">Tanggal Mulai</span>
<input
type="date" value={startDate} onChange={e =>
setStartDate(e.target.value)}
className="bg-slate-50 dark:bg-slate-800 border border-
slate-200 dark:border-slate-700 rounded-xl px-3 py-1.5 text-xs font-
semibold outline-none"
/>
</div>
<div>
<span className="text-[10px] font-black uppercase text-slate-
400 block mb-1">Tanggal Selesai</span>
<input
type="date" value={endDate} onChange={e =>
setEndDate(e.target.value)}
className="bg-slate-50 dark:bg-slate-800 border border-
slate-200 dark:border-slate-700 rounded-xl px-3 py-1.5 text-xs font-
semibold outline-none"
/>
</div>
</div>
<button
onClick={() => window.print()}
className="flex items-center gap-2 bg-indigo-600 hover:bg-
indigo-700 text-white px-5 py-2.5 rounded-xl font-bold text-xs shadow-md
shadow-indigo-600/10 transition self-stretch md:self-auto justify-center"
>
<Printer size={15} />
<span>Cetak Laporan</span>
</button>
</div>
{/* RENDERED SELECTED REPORT */}
<div className="bg-white dark:bg-slate-900 border border-slate-200
dark:border-slate-800 rounded-2xl shadow-sm overflow-hidden p-6 space-y-
6">
<div className="border-b pb-4 dark:border-slate-800 flex justify-
between items-center">
<div>
<h3 className="font-extrabold text-sm uppercase tracking-wide
text-slate-800 dark:text-white">
{selectedReportType === 'Payroll' && 'Laporan Pengeluaran
Finansial Bulanan'}
{selectedReportType === 'Attendance' && 'Rekap Kehadiran
Terintegrasi Karyawan'}
{selectedReportType === 'Division' && 'Distribusi Keuangan
per Divisi Operasional'}
</h3>
<p className="text-xs text-slate-500">Rentang waktu:
{startDate} s/d {endDate}</p>
</div>
<span className="text-[10px] font-mono text-slate-400">GajiKu
HRIS Engine 2.1</span>
</div>
{/* Dynamic content rendering based on selectedReportType */}
{selectedReportType === 'Payroll' && (
<div className="space-y-6">
<div className="overflow-x-auto">
<table className="w-full text-left border-collapse text-
xs">
<thead>
<tr className="bg-slate-50 dark:bg-slate-800/40 font-
bold uppercase tracking-wider text-slate-500 dark:border-slate-800
border-b">
<th className="p-3">Nama Karyawan</th>
<th className="p-3">NIK</th>
<th className="p-3">Divisi</th>
<th className="p-3">Gaji Pokok</th>
<th className="p-3">Tunjangan</th>
<th className="p-3">Potongan</th>
<th className="p-3">Gaji Bersih</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody className="divide-y divide-slate-100 dark:divide-
slate-800">
{payrolls.map((p, i) => (
<tr key={i}>
<td className="p-3 font-bold text-slate-800
dark:text-slate-100">{p.name}</td>
<td className="p-3 text-slate-500 font-
mono">{p.nik}</td>
<td className="p-3 text-indigo-500 font-
