semibold">{p.division}</td>
<td className="p-3">Rp
{p.baseSalary.toLocaleString('id-ID')}</td>
<td className="p-3 text-emerald-600">+Rp
{(p.allowance + p.overtime + p.bonus).toLocaleString('id-ID')}</td>
<td className="p-3 text-rose-600">-Rp
{p.deduction.toLocaleString('id-ID')}</td>
<td className="p-3 font-extrabold text-slate-800
dark:text-slate-100">Rp {p.netSalary.toLocaleString('id-ID')}</td>
</tr>
))}
</tbody>
</table>
</div>
<div className="p-4 bg-slate-50 dark:bg-slate-950 border
border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-800 rounded-xl flex justify-between
items-center">
<span className="text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider
text-slate-500">Total Pengeluaran Gaji Bersih Kumulatif:</span>
<span className="text-lg font-black text-slate-950
dark:text-white">
Rp {payrolls.reduce((sum, p) => sum + p.netSalary,
0).toLocaleString('id-ID')}
</span>
</div>
</div>
)}
{selectedReportType === 'Attendance' && (
<div className="overflow-x-auto">
<table className="w-full text-left border-collapse text-xs">
<thead>
<tr className="bg-slate-50 dark:bg-slate-800/40 font-bold
uppercase tracking-wider text-slate-500 border-b dark:border-slate-800">
<th className="p-3">Karyawan</th>
<th className="p-3">Hadir</th>
<th className="p-3">Izin</th>
<th className="p-3">Sakit</th>
<th className="p-3">Keterlambatan Kumulatif</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody className="divide-y divide-slate-100 dark:divide-
slate-800">
{employees.map((emp, i) => {
const logs = attendance.filter(a => a.nik === emp.nik);
const hadir = logs.filter(a => a.status ===
'Hadir').length;
const izin = logs.filter(a => a.status ===
'Izin').length;
const sakit = logs.filter(a => a.status ===
'Sakit').length;
const lateMinutes = logs.reduce((sum, curr) => sum +
curr.minutesLate, 0);
return (
<tr key={i}>
<td className="p-3 font-bold text-slate-800
dark:text-slate-100">{emp.name} ({emp.nik})</td>
<td className="p-3 text-emerald-600 font-
bold">{hadir} Kali</td>
<td className="p-3 text-blue-600 font-bold">{izin}
Kali</td>
<td className="p-3 text-amber-600 font-
bold">{sakit} Kali</td>
<td className="p-3 text-rose-600 font-
black">{lateMinutes} Menit</td>
</tr>
);
})}
</tbody>
</table>
</div>
)}
{selectedReportType === 'Division' && (
<div className="space-y-6">
<div className="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 gap-4">
{aggregateDivSalary.map((item, i) => (
<div key={i} className="p-4 rounded-xl border border-
slate-200 dark:border-slate-800 bg-slate-50 dark:bg-slate-850 flex
justify-between items-center">
<div>
<h5 className="font-extrabold text-slate-800
dark:text-slate-200">{item.division}</h5>
<p className="text-[10px] text-slate-500">Anggaran
Dasar Pokok</p>
</div>
<span className="font-bold text-indigo-600 dark:text-
indigo-400">Rp {item.totalSalary.toLocaleString('id-ID')}</span>
</div>
))}
</div>
</div>
)}
</div>
</div>
);
}
function SettingsView({ companySettings, setCompanySettings, currentRole,
auditLogs, addAuditLog }) {
const [formBranch, setFormBranch] = useState(companySettings.branch);
const [formName, setFormName] = useState(companySettings.name);
const [formCheckIn, setFormCheckIn] =
useState(companySettings.defaultCheckIn);
const handleSaveSettings = (e) => {
e.preventDefault();
setCompanySettings({
...companySettings,
name: formName,
branch: formBranch,
defaultCheckIn: formCheckIn
});
addAuditLog('Memperbarui Pengaturan Perusahaan dan Jam Kerja
Standar');
alert('Pengaturan Perusahaan berhasil disimpan secara global!');
};
return (
<div className="space-y-6">
{/* Title Header */}
<div>
<h2 className="text-2xl font-black text-slate-800 dark:text-
slate-100 flex items-center gap-2 tracking-tight">
Pengaturan Sistem & Log Audit <span className="text-xs px-2.5
py-1 rounded bg-indigo-100 dark:bg-indigo-950 text-indigo-700 dark:text-
indigo-400 font-extrabold uppercase">Settings</span>
</h2>
<p className="text-sm text-slate-500 dark:text-slate-
400">Konfigurasi parameter global perusahaan dan pantau jejak aktivitas
operator sistem.</p>
</div>
<div className="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-6">
{/* COMPANY SETTINGS FORM */}
<div className="bg-white dark:bg-slate-900 border border-slate-
200 dark:border-slate-800 rounded-2xl p-6 shadow-sm lg:col-span-1 space-
y-4">
<h3 className="text-sm font-black text-slate-800 dark:text-
slate-100 uppercase tracking-wider border-b pb-3 dark:border-slate-
800">Identitas Perusahaan</h3>
<form onSubmit={handleSaveSettings} className="space-y-4 text-
xs">
<div className="space-y-1">
<label className="font-bold text-slate-500">Nama Perusahaan
(Legal)</label>
<input
type="text" value={formName} onChange={e =>
setFormName(e.target.value)}
className="w-full bg-slate-50 dark:bg-slate-800 border
border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-700 rounded-xl px-3 py-2 outline-none
focus:ring-1 focus:ring-indigo-500"
/>
</div>
<div className="space-y-1">
<label className="font-bold text-slate-500">Cabang
Operasional</label>
<input
type="text" value={formBranch} onChange={e =>
setFormBranch(e.target.value)}
className="w-full bg-slate-50 dark:bg-slate-800 border
border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-700 rounded-xl px-3 py-2 outline-none
focus:ring-1 focus:ring-indigo-500"
/>
</div>
<div className="space-y-1">
<label className="font-bold text-slate-500">Batas Toleransi
Absen (Default Check-In)</label>
<input
type="text" value={formCheckIn} onChange={e =>
setFormCheckIn(e.target.value)}
className="w-full bg-slate-50 dark:bg-slate-800 border
border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-700 rounded-xl px-3 py-2 outline-none
focus:ring-1 focus:ring-indigo-500"
/>
</div>
<div className="pt-2">
<button
type="submit"
className="w-full py-2.5 bg-indigo-600 hover:bg-indigo-
700 text-white rounded-xl font-bold transition text-xs shadow-md shadow-
indigo-600/10"
>
Terapkan Perubahan
</button>
</div>
</form>
</div>
{/* COMPREHENSIVE ACTIVITY AUDIT LOGS */}
<div className="bg-white dark:bg-slate-900 border border-slate-
200 dark:border-slate-800 rounded-2xl p-6 shadow-sm lg:col-span-2 space-
y-4">
<h3 className="text-sm font-black text-slate-800 dark:text-
slate-100 uppercase tracking-wider border-b pb-3 dark:border-slate-800">
Jejak Keamanan Audit Log (Kepatuhan ISO/IEC 27001)
</h3>
<div className="space-y-3 max-h-[350px] overflow-y-auto pr-1">
{auditLogs.map((log, i) => (
<div key={i} className="flex gap-4 p-3 rounded-xl bg-slate-
50 dark:bg-slate-850 border border-slate-100 dark:border-slate-800 text-
xs items-start">
<Clock className="text-indigo-500 shrink-0 mt-0.5"
size={14} />
<div className="flex-1">
<p className="font-bold text-slate-800 dark:text-slate-
100">{log.action}</p>
<p className="text-[10px] text-slate-400 mt-0.5">Oleh:
{log.user} • {log.timestamp}</p>
</div>
<span className="text-[9px] bg-indigo-100 dark:bg-indigo-
950 text-indigo-700 dark:text-indigo-400 px-2 py-0.5 rounded font-bold
uppercase">
SUKSES
</span>
</div>
))}
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
);
}
// High quality static reference code for developers
const PRISMA_SCHEMA_CODE = `datasource db {
provider = "postgresql"
url = env("DATABASE_URL")
}
generator client {
provider = "prisma-client-js"
}
enum Role {
SUPER_ADMIN
HRD
MANAGER
STAFF
}
enum EmployeeStatus {
TETAP
KONTRAK
MAGANG
}
enum AttendanceStatus {
HADIR
IZIN
SAKIT
ALPHA
LIBUR
}
enum PayrollStatus {
PENDING_APPROVAL
APPROVED
PAID
}
model User {
id String @id @default(uuid())
email String @unique
password String
role Role @default(STAFF)
createdAt DateTime @default(now())
updatedAt DateTime @updatedAt
auditLogs AuditLog[]
}
model Employee {
nik String @id
name String
email String @unique
phone String
address String
joinDate DateTime
status EmployeeStatus @default(KONTRAK)
position String
isActive Boolean @default(true)
photoUrl String?
divisionId String
division Division @relation(fields: [divisionId], references:
[id])
attendances Attendance[]
payrolls Payroll[]
createdAt DateTime @default(now())
updatedAt DateTime @updatedAt
}
model Division {
id String @id @default(uuid())
name String @unique
baseSalary Float
employees Employee[]
}
model Attendance {
id String @id @default(uuid())
date DateTime @db.Date
checkIn String?
checkOut String?
status AttendanceStatus @default(HADIR)
minutesLate Int @default(0)
employeeId String
employee Employee @relation(fields: [employeeId],
references: [nik], onDelete: Cascade)
@@unique([employeeId, date])
}
model Payroll {
id String @id @default(uuid())
month String // e.g. "Mei 2026"
baseSalary Float
allowance Float @default(0)
deduction Float @default(0)
bonus Float @default(0)
overtime Float @default(0)
netSalary Float
status PayrollStatus @default(PENDING_APPROVAL)
approvedBy String?
approvedAt DateTime?
employeeId String
employee Employee @relation(fields: [employeeId], references:
[nik], onDelete: Cascade)
createdAt DateTime @default(now())
updatedAt DateTime @updatedAt
}`;
const BACKEND_API_EXPRESS = `const express = require('express');
const { PrismaClient } = require('@prisma/client');
const bcrypt = require('bcrypt');
const jwt = require('jsonwebtoken');
const helmet = require('helmet');
const cors = require('cors');
const rateLimit = require('express-rate-limit');
const prisma = new PrismaClient();
const app = express();
app.use(express.json());
app.use(helmet());
app.use(cors());
// Rate Limiting to prevent brute force
const limiter = rateLimit({
windowMs: 15 * 60 * 1000,
max: 100
});
app.use(limiter);
// JWT Auth Middleware
const authenticateToken = (req, res, next) => {
const authHeader = req.headers['authorization'];
const token = authHeader && authHeader.split(' ')[1];
if (!token) return res.status(401).json({ message: 'Token tidak
ditemukan' });
jwt.verify(token, process.env.JWT_SECRET, (err, user) => {
if (err) return res.status(403).json({ message: 'Token tidak valid'
});
req.user = user;
next();
});
};
// --- AUTH API ---
app.post('/api/auth/login', async (req, res) => {
const { email, password } = req.body;
try {
const user = await prisma.user.findUnique({ where: { email } });
if (!user) return res.status(404).json({ message: 'Pengguna tidak
ditemukan' });
const match = await bcrypt.compare(password, user.password);
if (!match) return res.status(400).json({ message: 'Sandi salah' });
const accessToken = jwt.sign(
{ email: user.email, role: user.role },
process.env.JWT_SECRET,
{ expiresIn: '1d' }
);
res.json({ accessToken, role: user.role });
} catch (error) {
res.status(500).json({ error: error.message });
}
});
// --- EMPLOYEE CRUD API ---
app.get('/api/employees', authenticateToken, async (req, res) => {
try {
const employees = await prisma.employee.findMany({ include: {
division: true } });
res.json(employees);
} catch (error) {
res.status(500).json({ error: error.message });
}
});
app.post('/api/employees', authenticateToken, async (req, res) => {
if (req.user.role !== 'SUPER_ADMIN' && req.user.role !== 'HRD') {
return res.status(403).json({ message: 'Akses ditolak' });
}
try {
const newEmployee = await prisma.employee.create({ data: req.body });
res.status(201).json(newEmployee);
} catch (error) {
res.status(400).json({ error: error.message });
}
});
// --- PAYROLL ENGINE API ---
app.post('/api/payroll/generate', authenticateToken, async (req, res) =>
{
if (req.user.role !== 'SUPER_ADMIN' && req.user.role !== 'HRD') {
return res.status(403).json({ message: 'Akses ditolak' });
}
const { month } = req.body;
try {
const employees = await prisma.employee.findMany({ where: { isActive:
true }, include: { division: true } });
const payrolls = await Promise.all(employees.map(async (emp) => {
// Logic for computing allowances & deductions
const base = emp.division.baseSalary;
const net = base + 500000 - 150000; // Mock math formula
return prisma.payroll.create({
data: {
employeeId: emp.nik,
month,
baseSalary: base,
allowance: 500000,
deduction: 150000,
netSalary: net,
status: 'PENDING_APPROVAL'
}
});
}));
res.json({ message: 'Batch payroll berhasil di-generate', data:
payrolls });
} catch (error) {
res.status(500).json({ error: error.message });
}
});
const PORT = process.env.PORT || 5000;
app.listen(PORT, () => console.log('Server berjalan di port ' + PORT));`;
const DUMMY_SEEDER_CODE = `const { PrismaClient } =
require('@prisma/client');
const bcrypt = require('bcrypt');
const prisma = new PrismaClient();
async function main() {
// Clear tables
await prisma.payroll.deleteMany();
await prisma.attendance.deleteMany();
await prisma.employee.deleteMany();
await prisma.division.deleteMany();
await prisma.user.deleteMany();
// 1. Seed Users for Auth
const hashedAdminPass = await bcrypt.hash('admin123', 10);
const hashedHRDPass = await bcrypt.hash('hrd123', 10);
await prisma.user.createMany({
data: [
{ email: 'admin@payroll.com', password: hashedAdminPass, role:
'SUPER_ADMIN' },
{ email: 'hrd@payroll.com', password: hashedHRDPass, role: 'HRD' }
]
});
// 2. Seed 11 Divisions specified in specifications
const divNames = [
'Waiter', 'Kasir', 'Nusantara', 'Seafood', 'Cendol',
'Minuman', 'CleanUp', 'Kebersihan', 'Cucian Piring', 'Staff Gudang',
'Potongan'
];
const divisions = await Promise.all(
divNames.map(name =>
prisma.division.create({
data: { name, baseSalary: 3000000 + (Math.random() * 1500000) }
})
)
);
console.log('Seeding selesai dengan sukses!');
}
main()
.catch((e) => { console.error(e); process.exit(1); })
.finally(async () => { await prisma.$disconnect(); });`;
const README_INSTALLATION = `# GajiKu Enterprise HRIS Setup Guide
## Persyaratan Sistem
- Node.js >= 18.x
- PostgreSQL >= 14.x
## Langkah Instalasi Lokal
### 1. Kloning dan Instal Dependensi Backend
\`\`\`bash
cd backend
npm install
\`\`\`
### 2. Atur Berkas Kunci Lingkungan (.env)
Buat file \`.env\` di direktori \`backend/\`:
\`\`\`env
DATABASE_URL="postgresql://postgres:root@localhost:5443/payroll_db?schema
=public"
JWT_SECRET="supersecretkey-enterprisegrade-98765"
PORT=5000
\`\`\`
### 3. Migrasi & Seed Database Prisma
\`\`\`bash
npx prisma migrate dev --name init
npx prisma db seed
\`\`\`
### 4. Jalankan Backend Server
\`\`\`bash
npm run start
\`\`\`
### 5. Jalankan Frontend React
\`\`\`bash
cd ../frontend
npm install
npm run dev
\`\`\`
## Langkah Deployment Cloud
### Backend (Railway / Render)
1. Hubungkan repositori GitHub Anda ke Railway.
2. Tambahkan variabel lingkungan: \`DATABASE_URL\`, \`JWT_SECRET\`.
3. Gunakan build command: \`npx prisma generate && npm run build\`.
### Database (PostgreSQL Cloud)
Gunakan Supabase, Neon.tech, atau PostgreSQL bawaan Railway sebagai
backend storage.`;
function DeveloperHubView() {
const [activeCodeTab, setActiveCodeTab] = useState('prisma');
return (
<div className="space-y-6">
{/* Title Header */}
<div>
<h2 className="text-2xl font-black text-slate-800 dark:text-
slate-100 flex items-center gap-2 tracking-tight">
Developer Code Hub <span className="text-xs px-2.5 py-1 rounded
bg-indigo-100 dark:bg-indigo-950 text-indigo-700 dark:text-indigo-400
font-extrabold uppercase">Engineering</span>
</h2>
<p className="text-sm text-slate-500 dark:text-slate-400">Gunakan
berkas ini untuk langsung melakukan replikasi dan deploy di server lokal
atau server cloud produksi Anda.</p>
</div>
{/* Code File Navigation */}
<div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2 border-b dark:border-slate-800
pb-3">
{[
{ id: 'prisma', label: 'schema.prisma', icon: Database },
{ id: 'express', label: 'server.js (Express)', icon: Shield },
{ id: 'seeder', label: 'seed.js (Dummy Data)', icon: UserCheck
},
{ id: 'readme', label: 'README.md (Deploy Guide)', icon:
BookOpen }
].map(tab => {
const Icon = tab.icon;
const isActive = activeCodeTab === tab.id;
return (
<button
key={tab.id}
onClick={() => setActiveCodeTab(tab.id)}
className={`flex items-center gap-2 px-4 py-2 rounded-xl
text-xs font-bold transition ${
isActive ? 'bg-indigo-600 text-white shadow' : 'bg-white
dark:bg-slate-900 text-slate-500 hover:text-slate-850 dark:hover:text-
slate-200 border border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-800'
}`}
>
<Icon size={14} />
<span>{tab.label}</span>
</button>
);
})}
</div>
{/* Code Display Area */}
<div className="bg-slate-900 text-slate-200 rounded-2xl p-6 shadow-
xl border border-slate-800 font-mono text-xs overflow-x-auto relative">
<button
onClick={() => {
let code = '';
if (activeCodeTab === 'prisma') code = PRISMA_SCHEMA_CODE;
else if (activeCodeTab === 'express') code =
BACKEND_API_EXPRESS;
else if (activeCodeTab === 'seeder') code =
DUMMY_SEEDER_CODE;
else code = README_INSTALLATION;
navigator.clipboard.writeText(code);
alert('Kode berhasil disalin ke clipboard!');
}}
className="absolute top-4 right-4 bg-slate-850 hover:bg-slate-
800 text-[10px] px-3 py-1.5 rounded-lg border border-slate-700 font-sans
font-bold transition"
>
Salin Kode
</button>
<pre className="mt-4 whitespace-pre pr-2">
{activeCodeTab === 'prisma' && PRISMA_SCHEMA_CODE}
{activeCodeTab === 'express' && BACKEND_API_EXPRESS}
{activeCodeTab === 'seeder' && DUMMY_SEEDER_CODE}
{activeCodeTab === 'readme' && README_INSTALLATION}
</pre>
</div>
</div>
);
}
